news.Title: 《日股》日經與TOPIX震盪收低
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 16:03:55 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(2)日震盪走低。日經225指數收於66734.24點，下跌200.09點或0.30%，終止連續2個交易日上漲，盤中最低觸及65551.13點；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3924.24點，下跌16.46點或0.42%。盤面受到地緣政治不確定性及原油期貨回升的壓力，並在國際資金輪動與美國經濟數據、日本央行(日銀、BOJ)政策預期交錯影響下，呈現高波動性的下跌走勢。

權值股與類股表現方面，大型權值股漲跌互見，武藏精密工業(7220.JP)、日東紡(3110.JP)、三井金屬礦業(5706.JP)、安川電機(6506.JP)、FANUC(6954.JP)等均下跌；AGC(5201.JP)、Rigaku(268A.JP)、Kubota(6326.JP)、任天堂(7974.JP)、Sony Group(6758.JP)、LASERTEC(6920.JP)等上揚。類股方面，非鐵金屬、金屬製品與玻璃土石製品表現偏弱，礦業、石油煤炭製品與海運業則相對抗跌，盤面呈現由傳產及能源族群支撐、科技與機械類股分化的結構性輪動。

此外，以ARM帶動的AI與半導體題材延續買盤流入，資金在相關供應鏈和測試量測類股間流動，軟銀集團(9984.JP)與鎧俠(285A.JP)等為市場關注焦點；同時，OpenAI與SpaceX的IPO話題在國際市場發酵，推動與衛星、宇宙及相關軟硬體供應鏈概念股短線輪動，使得部分科技類股在大盤震盪中仍能吸引獲利了結外的買盤支持。

《日股》獲利了結、創高後回檔，日經跌0.25%

《日股》日經收漲2.87% 首破65000點創高

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: NVIDIA Pledges 50% Cash Flow Return as Huang Maps Agentic AI Future
news.Content:
Key Points

Interested in NVIDIA Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better.

NVIDIA says it will return at least 50% of free cash flow to shareholders this year, next year and beyond, building on its existing buyback program and higher dividend plans.

CEO Jensen Huang framed the company’s next growth phase around agentic AI , saying NVIDIA’s Vera Rubin and Grace Blackwell platforms are designed for AI agents that reason, use tools and run across data centers, PCs, cars and robots.

Huang also highlighted a push into AI PCs with Microsoft and said NVIDIA’s Vera CPUs are expected to play a key role in AI data centers, though he stressed the CPU opportunity will remain smaller than the GPU business.

Palantir’s Drone Tailwind Puts Its Defense AI Story Back in Focus for Investors

NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) founder and CEO Jensen Huang said the company plans to return at least half of its free cash flow to shareholders while outlining a broader strategy to reshape data centers, PCs and edge devices around “agentic” artificial intelligence.

Speaking at a company event that included analyst and investor questions, Huang opened with a capital return update. He reminded attendees that NVIDIA had previously announced an $80 billion share repurchase program and a 25-fold increase in its dividend. He then said the company now plans to return “50% or more of free cash flow to our shareholders this year, next year, and beyond.”

→ Costco’s Strong Quarter Still Leaves Investors With a Valuation Problem

Why 1 Little-Known ETF Is Riding the AI Chip Shortage

Huang added that NVIDIA plans to increase stock repurchases and its dividend over time.

Huang Frames AI Future Around Agents

Much of Huang’s presentation focused on what he described as a new computing pattern built around AI agents. He said agents can reason, use tools, access structured and unstructured long-term memory, and operate across cloud data centers, PCs, workstations, cars, robots and other edge devices.

→ These 3 Software Stocks Are Buying Back Shares Hand Over Fist

3 Active ETFs to Ride the Hands-On Management Trend

Huang said NVIDIA’s recent product announcements were designed around that shift. He described the Vera Rubin platform as built not only for pre-training, post-training and inference, but also for running agentic workloads that are “distributed and disaggregated” across a data center.

He said token generation remains the core economic driver for AI infrastructure customers, arguing that customers should maximize the number of GPUs in a given power envelope because “what you sell is tokens.” He said Grace Blackwell was designed to generate tokens at the lowest cost, while Vera Rubin extends the architecture to support agentic AI workflows.

Story Continues

Vera CPU Positioned for Agentic Workloads

→ Gap Inc. Cuts Sales Outlook After Q1 Miss, Shares Drop 17%

In response to a question from Morgan Stanley analyst Joe Moore about NVIDIA’s data center CPU opportunity, Huang said CPUs designed for agents will differ from prior CPUs built primarily for human-directed computing. He emphasized single-threaded performance, bandwidth, energy efficiency and CPU-to-CPU communication.

Huang said every data center using NVIDIA GPUs will “likely” use the company’s Vera CPUs, including head nodes, orchestration systems and storage servers. He also said Vera could sell beyond NVIDIA GPU systems through NVLink Fusion and in workloads such as data processing, electronic design automation and simulation.

However, Huang cautioned attendees not to equate the CPU opportunity with the GPU business in average selling price. He said NVIDIA’s GPU and networking businesses remain “quite large” and later added that while the CPU market may expand significantly as agents proliferate, it “can’t reasonably come close to a GPU.”

Huang also discussed Vera’s architecture, saying NVIDIA designed a custom Arm-based CPU core called Olympus rather than using an off-the-shelf Arm core. He said the chip is designed for high instructions per clock and high internal bandwidth, and that NVIDIA used Grace Blackwell to prepare data centers for the broader Vera transition.

Microsoft Partnership Targets AI PCs

Huang said NVIDIA and Microsoft have been working for several years on a new class of computers intended to make PCs function as personal AI assistants. He said the systems are designed to include tensor processing, model parameter compression and secure operating-system sandboxing so agents can be granted limited permissions to access files, tools and communications.

He characterized the effort as “the first reinvention of the PC” in decades, saying future PCs will not only run existing applications but also operate as assistants that can act on users’ behalf. Huang said agents should be able to use applications such as Adobe Photoshop, Adobe Premiere, Autodesk and other tools, rather than replace them.

In a lengthy exchange about why users would want local AI models rather than relying entirely on cloud-based models, Huang said both approaches are needed. He argued that local agents can run continuously, interact with files and tools on the device, and call more powerful cloud models when necessary.

“Why choose?” Huang said, describing a future in which power users rely on both local and cloud AI. He also said NVIDIA is not planning to re-enter smartphone chips, citing Apple and Qualcomm as strong players in mobile devices and saying NVIDIA’s software stack is more differentiated on PCs.

Networking, Supply Chain and Segments

Huang also discussed networking requirements for increasingly large AI data centers. He said NVIDIA will use copper “as long as we can” for short distances, while optics will be necessary for larger scale-out deployments. He said Spectrum-6 is designed for AI factories with hundreds of thousands to potentially a million systems, and noted NVIDIA’s partnerships and investments involving companies including Coherent, Lumentum, Corning and Marvell.

Asked about supply chain capacity, Huang said NVIDIA has support from its ecosystem for “very robust growth,” though he also said the world supply chain remains supply constrained. He said the company has enough support to back the guidance it has provided.

Huang also explained NVIDIA’s recent financial resegmentation, saying the goal was to help investors understand how the business works beyond a single large data center revenue number. He described three broad areas:

Cloud service providers, where NVIDIA supports external customers, internal workloads and AI companies.

AI clouds, enterprises and industrial customers, including regional and specialized infrastructure operators.

Robotics and edge systems tied to physical AI.

Huang said the new segmentation is intended to give investors more granularity as AI expands across cloud, enterprise, industrial and edge markets.

In response to a shareholder question about public skepticism toward AI, Huang said the industry must build AI safely and securely while avoiding rhetoric that discourages people from using the technology. He said he advises his own children to use AI because he does not want them “to be left behind.”

About NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA)

NVIDIA Corporation, founded in 1993 and headquartered in Santa Clara, California, is a global technology company that designs and develops graphics processing units (GPUs) and system-on-chip (SoC) technologies. Co-founded by Jensen Huang, who serves as president and chief executive officer, along with Chris Malachowsky and Curtis Priem, NVIDIA has grown from a graphics-focused chipmaker into a broad provider of accelerated computing hardware and software for multiple industries.

The company's product portfolio spans discrete GPUs for gaming and professional visualization (marketed under the GeForce and NVIDIA RTX lines), high-performance data center accelerators used for AI training and inference (including widely adopted platforms such as the A100 and H100 series), and Tegra SoCs for automotive and edge applications.

This instant news alert was generated by narrative science technology and financial data from MarketBeat in order to provide readers with the fastest reporting and unbiased coverage. Please send any questions or comments about this story to contact@marketbeat.com.

The article " NVIDIA Pledges 50% Cash Flow Return as Huang Maps Agentic AI Future " was originally published by MarketBeat.

news.Title: 台股45K還不賣「是靠技術派」？ 他曬千萬獲利喊：我也沒在停
news.Content:
AI熱潮推動下台股頻改寫新高，不少投資人開始思考是否該獲利了結。不過，有網友在PTT發文表示，許多散戶可能早在指數4萬至4萬1千點時就已經停利出場，如今大盤已站上4.5萬點，讓他好奇那些一路抱股至今、一張不賣的投資人，究竟是靠技術分析，還是有其他看多理由。

原PO表示，若依照一般技術分析或波浪理論的角度來看，台股歷經長時間大漲後，似乎已來到值得留意的區域，因此想知道目前市場上持續抱股、不願停利的投資人，究竟是依循什麼邏輯操作。貼文曝光後，隨即引發熱烈討論，多數網友認為現階段並沒有急著出場的理由，甚至直言「買進持有為何要停利」、「買指數本來就沒在停利」、「只要基本面沒變，為什麼要賣」。不少投資人認為，現階段AI產業仍處於高速成長階段，相關商機尚未完全反映在企業獲利上。有網友表示，「AI工業革命才剛開始」、「AI題材根本還沒走完」，認為市場主升段尚未結束，現在談停利可能還太早。

也有許多人從技術面提出不同看法。部分網友指出，真正的技術分析並非預測高點，而是順勢而為，「沒跌破均線為什麼要賣」、「技術派本來就不猜頭摸底」、「月線都還沒跌破，根本沒有出場訊號」，認為目前多頭趨勢依舊完整。

除了基本面與技術面之外，還有不少投資人坦言，自己能夠一路抱股到現在，原因其實很單純，就是持股成本早已拉開距離。「成本差太遠了，回檔也沒感覺」、「抱了幾千點腳都麻了」、「賺太多反而不知道該怎麼賣」，成為討論串中的熱門回應。其中更有網友分享，自己的0050從均價40多元一路抱到現在，帳面未實現獲利已突破千萬元，並直言「我也沒在停啊，我沒能力擇時需要在賣啊」。

不過，也有部分網友提醒，目前市場氣氛過於樂觀值得留意。隨著越來越多人相信「台股只會漲」、「年底上看更高點位」，反而可能代表市場情緒逐漸升溫。有人認為，真正考驗投資人的時刻，還是在未來出現較大幅度修正時，才能看出究竟是有紀律的長線投資者，還是單純搭上多頭列車的幸運兒。面對台股站上4.5萬點，多數投資人並未將焦點放在停利時機，而是選擇持續押注AI長線成長趨勢。對許多人而言，比起猜測高點在哪裡，更重要的是等待市場出現明確轉弱訊號，再決定是否下車。

（封面示意圖/AI生成）

news.Title: 鉅亨雙週報》高利率、油價與AI投資潮並行，全球市場進入政策再定價期
news.Content:
過去兩週，全球市場同步面臨多重變數：一邊擔心通膨和利率風險再度升溫，一邊又被 AI、能源與新興市場的新玩法拉著跑。當美伊圍繞荷姆茲海峽議題持續角力，聯準會政策訊號轉趨審慎，中國加強資本流動管理，印度央行則表態必要時將動用外匯存底穩定匯市；同時，新興市場 ETF 也逐步由被動配置轉向主動管理。這些變化究竟會把市場推向新一輪行情，還是成為下一波震盪的序曲？

1. 通膨壓力未退：聯準會「不排除再升息」

美國方面，升息循環尚未明確落幕。新任聯準會主席凱文・沃什掛牌上任後，理事克里斯多福・沃勒隨即釋出「刪除寬鬆傾向，且不排除未來再度升息」的政策訊號；聖路易聯準銀行行長也提醒：AI 帶動的生產力提升未必足以抑制通膨，若物價持續停留在高檔，利率仍具進一步上行的政策正當性。市場對美債升息機率的期貨押注升溫，但在成交量偏低的情況下，價格反映更接近少數交易者的短線分歧，參考性仍有限。整體而言，利率見頂並不等同於降息即將啟動，美股短線仍須面對高利率環境的壓力。

2. 荷姆茲海峽變數升溫，油價壓力牽動全球風險資產

中東方面，美國和伊朗在荷姆茲海峽重開安排已接近協議，但細節仍待確認。伊朗最高領袖哈米尼堅持保留鈾庫存，並試圖在荷姆茲海峽收取過路費，連帶推動油價上行；五國亦直接拒絕伊朗設立「波斯灣安全管理局」的構想。油價抬頭，已透過美國 5 月製造業採購經理人指數（PMI）與房貸利率傳導到實體經濟：企業成本壓力上升、房貸族更難喘息。能源價格成了壓在通膨與利率之上的第二顆石頭，全球風險資產短期內難以忽視其影響。

3. 中國加強資本管理，新興市場配置轉向主動篩選

中國近兩週的政策主軸，聚焦於強化資本流動管理。一方面，政府擴大針對公民 2022 至 2024 年海外所得的稅務清查，並運用大數據與 AI 要求民眾自行核算補稅；另一方面，監管部門加大整頓離岸券商力道，對富途、老虎等業者祭出罰款、沒收違法所得，並要求兩年內關停境內客戶業務。政策目標相當明確：抑制資本外流並引導資金回流。若再結合 1 至 4 月固定資產投資衰退、房地產投資雙位數下滑，以及社會零售成長接近停滯等數據，中國經濟正走向「防風險優先，成長動能退居其次」的政策軌道。

在此背景下，新興市場資金開始尋找替代選項。5 月多家國際資產管理公司推出主動管理型新興市場 ETF，主要原因在於投資人不希望再由少數大型科技股主導指數表現，而是改由經理人依據國家與產業基本面進行主動篩選。對投資人而言，新興市場不再只是「單純買進一籃子指數」，主動選股與國別配置的重要性正在重新提升。

4. 日本出口回溫、印度匯率受關注，亞洲市場仍具結構性亮點

相較於中國市場承壓，亞洲其他主要市場則展現出不同層次的支撐力道。日本第一季 GDP 年化成長 2.1%，主要受惠於出口與民間消費回溫。雖然中東風險和油價上漲仍為未來變數，但在全球製造鏈重組、半導體設備與零組件需求支撐下，日本企業獲利體質相對穩健。

印度方面則是匯率成為市場焦點。印度央行行長公開表示盧比可能遭低估，並指出手上約 7,000 億美元外匯存底「必要時會用」，顯示央行對資本流動與匯率波動的容忍度偏低。隨著全球資金持續尋找中國以外的成長題材，印度雖有短線匯市干預與政策雜訊，卻穩居長期新興市場敘事的核心地位。

同時，AI 供應鏈仍在瘋狂搶產能。OpenAI 推出「算力保證合約」，企業可以透過 1 至 3 年長約鎖定運算資源，模式類似過往半導體產業鎖定晶圓產能。這也變相穩住半導體上游的資本支出與訂單能見度，可望對日本、台灣等硬體供應鏈形成中長期支撐。

鉅亨投資策略

趨勢仍是主軸，估值與政策風險須同步評估

在高利率尚未退場、油價具支撐、地緣政治風險延續的環境下，美股「長期看好」，但投資配置宜聚焦於財報確實受惠 AI 與能源效率的公司，避免單純追逐題材。受惠出口與半導體週期的日本股市同樣「長期看好」，日企財務體質改善與公司治理改革，是支撐估值的重要因素。中國市場在房市偏弱、資本管制轉緊下，評價以「中立 / 相對保守」看待，資金進出更應謹慎。至於黃金、原油等大宗商品，在通膨與地緣政治的交互影響下波動可能擴大，建議「維持中立」、作為避險與配置工具，而不是主戰場。

鉅亨精選基金

A49038

路博邁台灣 5G 股票基金

A32091

野村日本領先基金

B04046

柏瑞環球 - 環球重點股票基金

「鉅亨買基金」獨立經營管理

本資料僅供參考，「鉅亨買基金」已盡力就可靠之資料來源提供正確之意見與消息，但無法保證該等資料之完整性。

依金融消費者保護法最新相關規定，為提供投資人更好的投資服務，本公司施行「投資屬性評估」程序，您於鉅亨買基金網站完成「投資風險適合度」評估，本公司將依客戶屬性做商品適合度規範並至少每年請您更新一次，若未能完成屬性評估屆時將會影響您的交易。

基金交易係以長期投資為目的，不宜期待於短期內獲取高收益。任何基金單位之價格及其收益均可能漲或跌，故不一定能取回全部之投資金額。投資人申購前應自行了解判斷。

外幣計價之基金，投資人須承擔取得收益分配或買回價金時轉換回新臺幣可能產生之匯率風險。若轉換當時之新臺幣兌換外幣匯率相較於原始投資日之匯率升值時，投資人將承受匯兌損失。

各基金所採用之「公平價格調整」（或「反稀釋」）、短線交易及「價格調整機制（或「擺動定價」）」等機制，相關說明請詳各基金公開說明書。投資人應遵守基金公開說明書所列相關交易規定與限制。

各基金經金管會核准或同意生效，惟不表示絕無風險。基金經理公司以往之經理績效不保證基金之最低投資收益；基金經理公司除盡善良管理人之注意義務外，不負責本基金之盈虧，亦不保證最低之收益，投資人申購前應詳閱投資人須知／基金公開說明書。投資人申購前應自行了解判斷。

有關基金應負擔之費用（含分銷費用）已揭露於基金公開說明書及投資人須知，投資人可至 公開資訊觀測站 或 基金資訊觀測站 中查詢。

由於非投資等級債券基金之信用評等未達投資等級或未經信用評等，且對利率變動的敏感度甚高，故非投資等級債券基金可能會因利率上升、市場流動性下降，或債券發行機構違約不支付本金、利息或破產而蒙受虧損。非投資等級債券基金不適合無法承擔相關風險之投資人，投資人投資以非投資等級債券基金為訴求之基金不宜占其投資組合過高之比重。部份基金或所投資之債券子基金，可能投資美國 Rule 144A 債券，該等債券屬私募性質，較可能發生流動性不足，財務訊息揭露不完整或因價格不透明導致波動性較大之風險，投資人須留意相關風險。

基金投資於金融機構發行具損失吸收能力之債券（包括應急可轉換債券及具總損失吸收能力債券，下稱 CoCo Bond 及 TLAC 債券），當金融機構出現資本適足率低於一定水平、重大營運或破產危機時，得以契約形式或透過法定機制將債券減記面額或轉換股權，可能導致客戶部分或全部債權減記、利息取消、債權轉換股權、修改債券條件如到期日、票息、付息日、或暫停配息等變動。

基金配息不代表基金實際報酬，且過去配息不代表未來配息；基金淨值可能因市場因素而上下波動。

基金配息之配息率計算公式為「每單位配息金額 ÷ 除息日前一日之淨值 x100%」，含息報酬率計算為:[(除息日當月月底淨值 + 每單位配息金額) ÷ 前一月／三月／六月／一年底淨值 - 1]*100%。

股票入息基金所稱之「入息」係指基金會使用符合其投資目標之衍生性工具，以產生額外之收入。為獲取較一致性之配息收入，除股票投資之資本利得及股息收益外，賣出短期選擇權之已實現權利金收入亦屬於基金之配息來源之一。基金之衍生性金融商品投資策略，包括賣出短期選擇權買權操作，與其他股票型基金特性不同，在市場短線大幅上漲時，可能導致基金績效落後於市場之情形。為尋求一致地於該期間每月向股東分配股息，基金之配息可能由本金支出；惟上述配息政策並不表示配息固定不變。基金投資全球股票市場，亦即基金投資人亦將承擔股票基金一般所應承擔之風險，不會因為衍生性金融商品的操作而有所降低。此外，投資人應留意衍生性工具操作與本策略所可能產生之投資風險 (詳見公開說明書或投資人須知)。

部分基金配息前未先扣除應負擔之相關費用。基金的配息可能由基金的收益或本金中支付。任何涉及由本金支出的部份，可能導致原始投資金額減損。各基金由本金支付配息之相關資料，投資人可至各投信基金公司及總代理人網站查詢。

基金涉及投資新興市場部份，因其波動性與風險程度可能較高，且其政治與經濟情勢穩定度可能低於已開發國家，也可能使資產價值受不同程度之影響。依金管會規定：

投信基金直接投資大陸地區有價證券僅限掛牌上市有價證券，投資人須留意中國市場特定政治、經濟與市場等投資風險。

境外基金直接投資大陸地區證券市場之有價證券以掛牌上市有價證券及銀行間債券市場為限，且投資總金額不得超過本基金淨資產價值之百分之二十。但若該年度獲得境外基金深耕計畫認可者不在此限，比例得放寬至百分之四十。另投資人亦須留意中國市場特定政治、外匯、經濟與市場等投資風險。

本文提及之經濟走勢預測不必然代表基金之績效，基金投資風險請詳閱基金公開說明書。

投資人因不同時間進場，將有不同之投資績效，過去之績效亦不代表未來績效之保證。

投資人應注意貨幣基金投資之風險包括利率風險、債券交易市場流動性不足之風險及投資無擔保公司債之風險；本基金或有因利率變動、債券交易市場流動性不足及定期存單提前解約而影響基金淨值下跌之風險，同時或有受益人大量贖回時，至延遲給付贖回價款之可能。

風險報酬等級係依基金類型、投資區域或主要投資標的／產業，由低至高，區分為 RR1~RR5 五個風險報酬等級。RR 係計算過去五年基金淨值波動度標準差，以標準差區間予以分類等級，基金成立未滿五年，將以較短區間或適當參考標的作為評估標準。此等級分類係基於一般市場狀況反映市場價格波動風險，無法涵蓋所有風險 (如：基金計價幣別匯率風險、投資標的產業風險、信用風險、利率風險、流動性風險等)，亦不宜作為投資唯一依據，投資人應充分評估基金之投資風險。基金主要相關投資風險（如信用風險、流動性風險… 等）已揭露於基金公開說明書或投資人須知。其他相關資料(如年化標準差、Alpha、Beta 及 Sharp 值等) 可至中華民國投信投顧公會網站「 基金績效及評估指標查詢專區 」查詢。

上述資料來源僅供投資人參考，惟相關資訊仍應以各基金公司公告為準。如有任何疏漏錯誤，本公司或關係企業與其任何董事或任何受僱人恕不負任何法律責任。

有關基金之 ESG 資訊，投資人應於申購前詳閱基金公開說明書或投資人須知所載之基金所有特色或目標等資訊，基金 ESG 資訊可查詢 基金資訊觀測站 。

投資人申購基金係持有基金受益憑證，而非本文提及之投資資產或標的; 投資人應留意衍生性工具 / 證券相關商品等槓桿投資策略所可能產生之投資風險 (詳見公開說明書或投資人須知)。

news.Title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Micron, Nvidia, Marathon, Lenovo and Tapestry
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – June 2, 2026 – Zacks.com announces the list of stocks featured in the Analyst Blog. Every day the Zacks Equity Research analysts discuss the latest news and events impacting stocks and the financial markets. Stocks recently featured in the blog include: Micron Technology MU, Nvidia NVDA, Marathon Petroleum MPC, Lenovo Group LNVGY and Tapestry TPR.

Here are highlights from Tuesday’s Analyst Blog:

Jobs & Inflation During the Iran Conflict: Global Week Ahead

What happens within this Global Week Ahead?

Stop-start efforts by Tehran and Washington DC to extend their ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz dominate the market outlook, while

U.S. and Eurozone macro data should shed more light -- on the economic toll of the conflict

Elsewhere:

Indian policymakers grapple with the oil shock fallout, too

Colombians head to the polls, and

The club of trillion-dollar tech firms looks set to grow

Next are Reuters’ five world market themes, re-ordered for equity traders—

(1) What Stocks Have Made It to the $1T Market Cap Club?

The $1 trillion market-cap club has grown again, with South Korea's SK Hynix, and U.S.-listed Micron Technology joining the ranks.

Led by Nvidia , now valued at more than $5 trillion, the group is dominated by companies at the center of the AI boom.

The ‌additions underline the staying power of the AI-led rally, even as the Iran war drags on and deepens the global energy shock.

Investors now face a familiar dilemma: stick with a winning trade or worry more about concentration risk.

Strong markets can be the most vulnerable if sentiment turns.

(2) On Friday, Traders Can Study the May U.S. Non-farm Jobs Report

The latest U.S. monthly jobs report will test markets — and new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh — with investors alert to any signs of renewed inflation pressure.

Friday's May non-farm payrolls are expected to show jobs growth slowing to 96,000 and a jobless rate of 4.3%, according to a Reuters poll.

That follows a stronger-than-expected 115,000 rise in April, pointing to a still-resilient labor market. Manufacturing and services data should offer further clues on economic momentum.

Any hint of overheating could rattle markets, with inflation concerns already driving bouts of higher bond yields.

Inflation remains well above the Fed's 2.0% target ahead of Warsh's first meeting as U.S. central bank chief later in June.

Markets now see a greater chance of a rate hike than a cut in 2026, despite President Donald Trump’s calls for easing.

Story Continues

(3) On Tuesday, the Eurozone’s May HICP Inflation Data Comes Out

For European Central Bank policymakers, the key question is how far higher energy prices are feeding into broader inflation.

Tuesday's Eurozone May CPI numbers should provide some answers, especially as the Middle East conflict has dragged on long enough for second-round effects to emerge.

Analysts expect annual headline inflation of 3%, but just 2.2% excluding energy and food.

The ECB looks set to raise rates by 25 basis points in June regardless, but the outlook beyond is less certain.

Money markets are pricing in at least one, possibly two further hikes this year.

Much depends on inflation.

ECB chief economist Philip Lane has warned the energy shock could prove persistent, though he noted it differs from the surge four years ago, driven by the Ukraine war and post-pandemic demand.

(4) Indian Rupee On the Ropes

The Indian rupee's slide to record lows has fueled bets for a June 5th rate hike, despite signals the Reserve Bank of India is reluctant to use monetary policy to support the currency.

The rupee briefly neared 97 per dollar on May 22 before apparent central bank intervention steadied markets.

Heavy reliance on imported oil has left India exposed to the Iran war, driving capital outflows and weighing on the currency.

While three sources told Reuters the RBI is not in a hurry to raise rates, some major banks are penciling in a June move.

Traders are split evenly between a hike and no change, with some perhaps encouraged by Sri Lanka's surprise one-percentage-point increase days ago.

(5) Colombia Votes

Colombia’s first-round vote on Sunday looks set to pave the way for a June 21st runoff.

Leftist Senator Ivan Cepeda leads the polls but appears unlikely to secure an outright win, putting the focus on who advances with him: conservative Paloma Valencia or hard-right outsider Abelardo de la Espriella.

Markets will watch closely.

Cepeda promises continuity on social spending, while his rivals tout tighter fiscal policy, market-friendly incentives and a tougher security line — a message that has resonated across a region drifting right.

The peso and Ecopetrol (EC) shares will offer an immediate verdict.

With Brazil also heading towards a tight election in October between President Luiz Inacio "Lula" da Silva and right-wing challenger Flavio Bolsonaro, the broader theme is familiar: ideology matters less to markets than credible fiscal policy and inflation control.

Zacks #1 Rank (STRONG BUY) Stocks

Here are three Zacks #1 (STRONG BUY) large cap stocks, benefitting from fresh analyst earnings upgrades.

(1) Marathon Petroleum: This is a $251 a share oil & gas refining stock, with a market cap of $72.1B.

It is found in Zacks Oil & Gas-Refining industry. The stock holds a Zacks Value score of A, a Zacks Growth score of B, and a Zacks Momentum score of C.

F12M P/E: 8.2.

Marathon Petroleum is a leading independent refiner, transporter and marketer of petroleum products.

The company came into existence following the spin-off of Marathon Oil Corp.’s refining/sales business into a separate, independent and publicly-traded entity.

Marathon Oil has also completed the acquisition of its rival Andeavor.

Marathon Petroleum operates in two segments:

Refining and Marketing: The unit's operations refineries, located in the various regions of the United States.

Marathon Petroleum through its marketing organization sells transportation fuels, asphalt and specialty products throughout the country to support commercial, industrial and retail operations.

Midstream: This unit mainly reflects Marathon Petroleum's general partner and majority limited partner interests in MPLX LP and Andeavor Logistics LP that own and operate gathering and processing assets along with crude transportation and logistics infrastructure.

(2) Lenovo Group: This is a $51 a share tech stock, with a market cap of $30.1B.

It is found in the Zacks Computer-Micro industry. The stock holds a Zacks Value score of B, a Zacks Growth score of A, and a Zacks Momentum score of A.

F12M P/E: 18.0.

Lenovo Group is a personal technology company.

The company is dedicated to building PCs and mobile internet devices. Lenovo's business is built on product innovation, a highly-efficient global supply chain and strong strategic execution.

Formed by Lenovo Group's acquisition of the former IBM Personal Computing Division, the company develops, manufactures and markets reliable, high-quality, secure and easy-to-use technology products and services.

Its product lines include legendary Think-branded commercial PCs and Idea-branded consumer PCs, as well as servers, workstations, and a family of mobile internet devices, including tablets and smartphones.

Lenovo has major research centers in Yamato, Japan; Beijing, Shanghai and Shenzhen, China; and Raleigh, North Carolina.

Lenovo Group Limited is based in Quarry Bay, Hong Kong.

(3) Tapestry: This is a $145 a share Cosmetics stock, with a market cap of $28.0B.

It is found in the Zacks Retail-Apparel & Shoes industry. The stock holds a Zacks Value score of D, a Zacks Growth score of A, and a Zacks Momentum score of B.

F12M P/E: 20.2.

Tapestry, formerly known as Coach, is the designer and marketer of fine accessories and gifts for women and men in the United States and internationally.

The company offers lifestyle products, which include handbags, women's and men's accessories, footwear, jewelry, seasonal apparel collections, sunwear, travel bags, fragrance and watches.

Tapestry now operates under three product segments comprising Coach brand, Kate Spade & Company and Stuart Weitzman.

The Coach Brand North American regional segment includes sales to customers via North American company-owned stores, including the Internet, and sales to North American wholesale customers and distributors.

The Coach Brand International regional segment includes sales via company-operated outlets (including the Internet) and concession store-in-stores in Japan, mainland China, Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, Taiwan, Malaysia, South Korea, the United Kingdom, France, Ireland, Spain, Portugal, Germany, Italy, Austria, Belgium, the Netherlands and Switzerland.

Why Haven't You Looked at Zacks' Top Stocks?

Since 2000, our top stock-picking strategies have blown away the S&P's +7.7% average gain per year. Amazingly, they soared with average gains of +48.4%, +50.2% and +56.7% per year.

Today you can access their live picks without cost or obligation.

See Stocks Free >>

Media Contact

Zacks Investment Research

800-767-3771 ext. 9339

support@zacks.com

https://www.zacks.com

Past performance is no guarantee of future results. Inherent in any investment is the potential for loss . No recommendation or advice is being given as to whether any investment is suitable for a particular investor. It should not be assumed that any investments in securities, companies, sectors or markets identified and described were or will be profitable. All information is current as of the date of herein and is subject to change without notice. Any views or opinions expressed may not reflect those of the firm as a whole. Zacks Investment Research does not engage in investment banking, market making or asset management activities of any securities. These returns are from hypothetical portfolios consisting of stocks with Zacks Rank = 1 that were rebalanced monthly with zero transaction costs. These are not the returns of actual portfolios of stocks. The S&P 500 is an unmanaged index. Visit https://www.zacks.com/performance for information about the performance numbers displayed in this press release.

news.Title: 《台股盤後》震盪逾千點、收漲219點續創新高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 15:46:18 新聞中心 發佈

台股今(2)日在台積電挾ADR漲勢領漲、輝達搶進AI PC題材帶動華碩/宏碁漲停效應下，加權指數盤初一度逼近46000大關，惟聯發科/台達電/日月光弱勢表現、日經225指數早盤也明顯下跌下，引發獲利了結賣壓，幸賴南亞科/國巨/鴻海/廣達維持強勢、金控股/南亞/遠紡/長榮亦有助攻表現下，加權指數雖上下震盪約1046點、終場仍創高收在45557.31點、續守5日線，上漲219.40點或0.48%，成交量微增至1兆6075億元。

輝達搶進AI PC、激勵相關軟硬體類股全面飛漲，並減少美伊和談烏雲罩頂、推升油價的利空影響，美國四大指數周一全面寫新高。亞洲股市方面，因日經225指數昨日創下歷史收盤新高紀錄，引發獲利了結賣壓，AI、半導體相關股下挫，拖累日經指數今日一度重摔，不過午盤跌幅收斂，收盤下跌0.3%；韓國股市持續走揚，KOSPI終場上漲0.15%。

台積電ADR周一漲逾4%，激勵今日台股股價收在2380元、上漲1.06%，加上輝達搶進AI PC，持續激勵電腦及週邊設備族群表現，宏碁、華碩、仁寶、緯創等都亮燈漲停，華擎、廣達、和碩也勁揚逾7%，同時記憶體族群南亞科、華邦電亮燈漲停，被動元件股華新科從跌停拉升至上漲9.62%、逼近漲停，國巨也有超過7%的漲幅，同時人氣股群創亦收小紅下，整體挹注電子類股今日收漲0.37%，對屢創新高的台股，帶來穩定軍心的作用。

以19大類股表現來看，南亞領軍的塑膠股上漲3.3%、新纖/遠紡領軍的紡織股上漲2.8%、正新領軍的橡膠股上漲2.6%，為今日漲幅最亮眼前三大族群。相對玻陶股跌4.4%、電機機械跌2.5%、化學生技跌2.2%，則為最弱勢的三大族群。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計賣超39.01億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)買超102.82億元，投信買超15.84億元，自營商賣超157.68億元。

三集瑞-KY衝AI，目標今年營收占比達45-50%

台股焦點：三集瑞-KY(6862.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Microchip, Ross Stores, MasTec, Arrow and Littelfuse
news.Content:
For Immediate Release

Chicago, IL – June 2, 2026 – Zacks.com announces the list of stocks featured in the Analyst Blog. Every day the Zacks Equity Research analysts discuss the latest news and events impacting stocks and the financial markets. Stocks recently featured in the blog include: Microchip Technology Inc. MCHP, Ross Stores Inc. ROST, MasTec Inc. MTZ, Arrow Electronics Inc. ARW and Littelfuse Inc. LFUS.

Here are highlights from Tuesday’s Analyst Blog:

5 Momentum Stocks to Buy for June After an Impressive May Rally

U.S. stock markets closed at record highs in May, supported by a solid first-quarter 2026 earnings season, continuation of artificial intelligence (AI) trade and expectations of a near-term solution to the Middle East geopolitical conflicts.

Last month, the three major stock indexes — the Dow, the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq Composite — rallied 3%, 5% and 8%, respectively. On May 29, the last trading day of the month, the indexes posted record intraday and closing highs.

Momentum Likely to Continue in June

AI trade is gathering steam as days progress. Ai infrastructure trade is now expanding from chips to memory and storage devices as well as servers and racks. Moreover, agentic AI is expanding the scope of AI infrastructure providers in the physical layer.

Massive AI data center growth is benefiting several nuclear power generator and reactor makers, construction giants, cooling and water purifying companies and industrial manufactures.

On May 28, the U.S. government entered into a "memorandum of understanding" with Iran to extend the ceasefire for 60 days and continue negotiations on Iran's nuclear program. The negotiations also include the reopening the Strait of Hormuz with Iran removing their mines within 30 days and the United States gradually lifting the naval blockade.

At this stage, we recommend five stocks with a favorable Zacks Rank that are expected to maintain their momentum in June, too. These are: Microchip Technology Inc. , Ross Stores Inc. , MasTec Inc. , Arrow Electronics Inc. and Littelfuse Inc.

Each of the stocks sports a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) at present and has a Zacks Momentum Score of A or B. You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank stocks here .

Microchip Technology Inc.

Microchip Technology benefits from growing AI investments. The company’s Gen 4 and Gen 5 data center products are witnessing strong sales growth. MCHP’s new products are expected to gain traction with the launch of the industry's first 3-nanometer-based PCIe Gen 6 switch that powers modern AI infrastructure.

Story Continues

These switches offer double bandwidth, lower latency, advanced security and high-density AI connectivity for next-generation cloud and data center performance. The success of the restructuring plan also bodes well for MCHP’s prospects. The company also entered the PCIe retimer market in the June 2026 quarter as a companion device for Gen6 switches, and disclosed an OEM design win that displaced a competitor.

MCHP has expanded connectivity, storage and compute offerings for AI and data center applications, as well as intelligent power modules for AI at the edge. These factors are expected to drive top-line growth in the long term.

Microchip Technology has an expected revenue and earnings growth rate of 31.5% and 84.2%, respectively, for the current year (ending March 2027). The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current year’s earnings has improved 17.5% in the last 30 days.

Ross Stores Inc.

Ross Stores has been benefiting from the strong execution of its off-price retail model. ROST continues to benefit from solid demand for value-driven merchandise, delivering 21% sales growth and 17% comps growth in first-quarter fiscal 2026, supported by effective merchandising and marketing initiatives.

ROST is also progressing well on store-expansion plans, with long-term growth potential across both banners, targeting 2,900 Ross Dress for Less and 700 dd’s DISCOUNTS stores. For fiscal 2026, ROST expects comps growth of 6-7%, with earnings of $7.50-$7.74, up 13-17% year over year.

Solid financial flexibility, disciplined capital allocation and ongoing share repurchases highlight ROST’s commitment to shareholder returns, underscoring a robust business for continued growth.

Ross Stores has an expected revenue and earnings growth rate of 8.2% and 15.6%, respectively, for the current year (ending January 2027). The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current year’s earnings has improved 3.9% over the last seven days.

MasTec Inc.

MasTec is a major beneficiary of the AI-powered data center boom. Emerging demand tied to AI and data centers is becoming a meaningful growth driver. MTZ highlighted increasing demand for fiber connectivity, low-latency networks and power infrastructure to support data centers.

MTZ is gaining traction in turnkey data center projects, leveraging its integrated capabilities across construction management, telecom, power and civil infrastructure. These projects require large-scale, multi-disciplinary execution, positioning MTZ to capture larger contract values and expand its addressable market over time.

MTZ is a leading solution provider for design, construction, and maintenance services in the wireless network space. High-speed wireless network connectivity is of utmost importance as both enterprises and households use more AI-driven products.

MasTec has an expected revenue and earnings growth rate of 22% and 35.3%, respectively, for the current year. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current year’s earnings has improved 3.5% over the last 30 days.

Arrow Electronics Inc.

Arrow Electronics benefits from continued operational momentum across Global Components and ECS, with Q1’26 consolidated sales of $9.47 billion, up 39% year over year and above guidance.

ARW’s diverse customer portfolio of thousands of leading manufacturers and service providers, provides revenue stability and reduces concentration risk. Strong cash flow generation from its asset-light model supports share buybacks and strategic investments. For the second quarter of 2026, Arrow expects consolidated sales of $9.15 billion to $9.75 billion.

Arrow Electronics has an expected revenue and earnings growth rate of 15.6% and 63.1%, respectively, for the current year. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current year’s earnings has improved 32.2% over the last 30 days.

Littelfuse Inc.

Littelfuse designs, manufactures, and sells electronic components, modules, and subassemblies. LFUS operates through three segments: Electronics, Transportation, and Industrial.

LFUS’ products are vital components in virtually every market that uses electrical energy, from consumer electronics to automobiles, commercial vehicles and industrial equipment. LFUS is also expanding into adjacent markets that complement their core business including power distribution centers for mining operations, generator controls and protection for marine applications, heavy-duty switches for commercial vehicles and electromechanical sensors used in the automotive industry.

Littelfuse has an expected revenue and earnings growth rate of 16.6% and 39.1%, respectively, for the current year. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the current year’s earnings has improved 14.4% over the last 30 days.

news.Title: European stocks rise as STMicroelectronics' forecasts lift tech stocks
news.Content:
June 2 (Reuters) - European shares opened higher on Tuesday as strong forecasts from chipmaker STMicroelectronics lifted technology stocks, while ‌investors awaited a key inflation report later in the ‌day for insights into how the Mideast conflict has affected the euro zone ​economy.

The pan-European STOXX 600 index rose 0.7% to 625.20 points by 0715 GMT. Technology stocks led sectoral gains with a 2.4% rise.

More from Yahoo Scout

What inflation expectations are affecting European markets?

What drove STMicroelectronics' strong stock performance?

How is the AI boom impacting European technology stocks?

How are geopolitical tensions influencing European investor sentiment?

Chipmaker STMicroelectronics rose 9.8% to hit 65.1 euros, its highest since September 2000, ‌after lifting revenue targets ⁠for its data centre business, signalling strong demand from the AI boom.

Other AI-related stocks such as Infineon ⁠and Schneider Electric added 5.2% and 2.4%, respectively.

Lebanon announced a partial ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel on Monday following a brief escalation ​of hostilities, ​which also aided risk sentiment.

Crude ​prices eased about 1% as ‌investors pinned hopes on U.S. President Donald Trump's remarks that talks with Iran were ongoing, despite a report saying that Tehran had suspended indirect negotiations with Washington.

Still, at $94 a barrel, energy prices will likely remain painful, analysts said.

A report on euro zone consumer ‌inflation, due later in the day, ​is expected to show consumer prices rose ​3.2% in May on ​an annual basis from the month before.

Traders expect ‌the European Central bank to hike ​interest rates by ​25 basis points when it meets next week, according to data compiled by LSEG.

Among individual shares, Abivax fell 27% after ​the French drugmaker ‌published the late-stage trial results for its inflammatory bowel ​drug.

(Reporting by Utkarsh Tushar Hathi and Johann M Cherian ​in Bengaluru; Editing by Janane Venkatraman)

news.Title: 凱基人壽續看好台股！前4月已實現資本利得近2百億　凱基金法說速讀
news.Content:
凱基金控今天舉辦法人說明會，針對台股投資操作策略，凱基人壽投資長謝欣欣指出，AI潮流帶動下，不是短暫風潮，而是有發展的故事，且可運用，台灣身為科技島，有好產業好公司，因此凱基人壽持續看好台股，股票部位操作相對積極，配置著墨蠻多，「期待股市好，操作好，全年獲利貢獻好」。

至於股利政策，凱基金財務長黃碧玲指出，股利發放，會以調整後的獲利（加計凱基人壽的FVOCI股票處份損益）來當作基礎考量，而不單單以凱基銀行跟凱基證券的獲利；考量點包括財務規劃與子公司成長動能，也會把殖利率、過往盈餘發放率，整合考量。

凱基人壽首季的股票投資報酬率31.68％，截至今年前4月，FVOCI的已實現資本利得將近2百億元，有效擴大了可供分配盈餘的計算基礎。

至於凱基人壽的保險合約之合約服務邊際(CSM)，首季CSM餘額達2409億元，成長主要來自新契約貢獻；CSM首季釋出至損益37億元，攤銷率6.3%(年化)，展望全年，CSM釋出目標150億元，明年目標是雙位數成長。

首季新契約CSM為82億元，跟全年目標330-350億元一致。

受惠於全球股市表現強勁，凱基金控4月底自結淨值，較去年底增加800億以上，普通股每股淨值23元以上。

凱基金認為，央行年底前有機會維持利率不變，如果美伊戰事延長，通膨上升，央行利率政策可能緊縮。

news.Title: 台積電成最大贏家！AI封裝重構半導體格局、大摩點名CoWoS、CPO、WoW三大技術
news.Content:
隨著人工智慧（AI）算力需求持續膨脹，半導體產業的競爭焦點已悄然從製程微縮轉移至封裝與系統整合能力。摩根士丹利最新報告指出，2030 年全球 AI 半導體市場規模將達 7,530 億美元，先進封裝技術已從配套環節躍升為決定 AI 晶片性能與成本的核心關鍵。

AI 晶片正成為驅動整個半導體產業成長的核心力量。摩根士丹利於今年 5 月發布的最新研究報告《大中華半導體：AI 封裝創新：CoWoS、CPO 與 WoW》（Greater China Semis: AI Packaging Innovation: CoWoS, CPO and WoW）明確指出，2030 年全球半導體市場規模將突破 1.5 兆美元。

其中，AI 半導體將貢獻半數市場空間，雲端 AI 半導體的潛在市場規模在 2026 年即將達到 4,850 億美元，2023 至 2030 年複合年增長率維持在 30% 的高速軌道。

支撐此一成長動能的，是全球雲端服務商毫不手軟的資本投入。報告追蹤全球前 11 大上市雲端服務商，預計 2026 年雲端資本支出規模將達 8,110 億美元，較市場共識預期高出 8%，為 AI 封裝產能提供穩定的需求基礎。

這股龐大資金流直接傳導至晶圓製造與先進封裝環節，也為台積電 ( 2330-TW ) 等關鍵供應商提供了穩定且可預期的需求基礎。

值得關注的是，AI 代理的崛起正在改寫算力架構配比。隨著 AI 從單純推理走向工具呼叫、程式執行與多代理協作，AI 集群中 CPU 與 GPU 的比例正從 1 比 12 快速向 1 比 2 遷移。

摩根士丹利因此上調調度類 CPU 的市場規模預測，基準情境下 2030 年整體 CPU 市場規模可達 1,250 億美元，牛市情境下更上看 2,380 億美元。

台積電 CoWoS：產能倍增，輝達吃下六成

分析指出，台積電無疑是這場封裝技術革命的最大受益者。報告預測其 2024 至 2029 年 AI 相關收入複合年增長率高達 60%，2026 年 AI 收入占總營收比例將首度突破三成。

CoWoS 作為當前高階 AI 晶片的標配 2.5D 封裝方案，產能擴張速度驚人。台積電 CoWoS 月產能預計將由 2023 年的 23,000 片晶圓提升至 2027 年的 165,000 片，2025、2026 兩年連續翻倍擴張。

客戶結構上，輝達 ( NVDA-US ) 是最主要的需求方，2026 年預計消耗 875,000 片晶圓，占比約六成；博通 ( AVGO-US ) 位居第二，占比約 20%，超微半導體 (<a href="#" data-ylk="slk:AMD-US;elm:context_link;itc:0;sec:content-canvas" data-yga

news.Title: Does the Surge in Demand for ASICs Make Broadcom a No-Brainer Buy Before June 3?
news.Content: The initial boom in artificial intelligence (AI) data center investment centered around hardware for training AI models -- workloads that demand massive parallel-processing capabilities. Graphics processing units (GPUs) are powerful and flexible parallel processors, and that property propelled the rise of GPU specialist Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) from an ordinary large cap worth around $350 billion at the start of 2023 to its current position as the world's most ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The AI data center investment boom initially focused on GPUs for training, propelling Nvidia's market cap.
• Demand for ASICs is projected to surpass GPUs due to cost constraints and evolving hyperscaler needs for inference.
• Broadcom (AVGO) is a leading ASIC designer, with hyperscalers like Google and Meta using custom chips.
• Broadcom forecasts $100 billion in fiscal 2027 sales from AI chips alone, but ASICs are unlikely to fully replace GPUs due to flexibility needs.
news.Keywords: ASICs, GPUs, AI inference, data center, hyperscalers

• Brady Corporation (BRC) is benefiting from data center-related growth, with wire identification products contributing significantly to its revenue.
• Belden (BDC) offers connectivity products for data centers, positioning it to benefit from inference spending which is projected to exceed data center infrastructure spending in the 2030s.
news.Keywords: AI, data center infrastructure, free cash flow, valuation, inference spending

news.Title: Arm May Hit $15 Billion AI Chip Revenue Goal Early, CEO Says
news.Content:
(Bloomberg) -- Arm Holdings Plc may achieve its target of $15 billion in sales of its own chips earlier than anticipated, its chief executive officer said, reflecting stronger-than-projected demand from the AI boom.

Most Read from Bloomberg

Russia Finance Officials Tell Putin War Spending Is Unaffordable

Canada Dips Into Technical Recession for First Time Since 2020

Alphabet to Raise $80 Billion in Equity for AI Spending

US Says Deals With Iran for Safe Hormuz Transit Are Prohibited

Andrew Left Found Guilty in Case That Spooked Short Sellers

CEO Rene Haas told Bloomberg Television he’s “very confident” of attaining that goal by the previously stated end of the decade. On Tuesday, he said there are indications the SoftBank Group Corp. company may reach that milestone sooner, in part because of overwhelming demand from an industry racing to build data centers and artificial intelligence services.

“I’m hoping to hit that sooner. Demand has been stronger than we anticipated,” Haas said in a brief interview on the sidelines of Computex, Asia’s biggest tech industry convention. “Demand has been fantastic.”

Arm announced plans in March to sell its own chips for the first time — a major strategic shift for a company that made its name licensing technology to semiconductor makers. As part of the move, the SoftBank-controlled firm laid out aggressive targets for the coming years, including that $15 billion projection. It expects revenue from the new chip business to eclipse sales from current operations, which focus on selling intellectual property.

Meta Platforms Inc. will be the first major customer for the company’s chip, called an AGI CPU. The product will have as many as 136 cores — a measure of processing power — and draw 300 watts of electricity, according to the UK-based company. Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. will produce the chip.

Arm decided to make the new component because customers asked for it, Haas reiterated on Tuesday. The central processing unit, often described as the brains of a computer, is designed to work alongside the accelerators offered by companies such as Nvidia Corp. It helps coordinate work between computers, prepares data and runs elements that provide a response to users making AI queries.

news.Title: STMicro lifts data centre revenue goals on AI demand, shares hit 25-year high
news.Content:
By Nathan Vifflin

June 2 (Reuters) - STMicroelectronics raised the 2026 and 2027 revenue targets for its data ‌centre business on Tuesday, citing continued strong demand ‌tied to AI infrastructure and progress in expanding capacity.

The Franco-Italian chipmaker's ​shares rose as much as 10% to €65.21 per share, their highest since September 2000. They were up 8.4% as of 0738 GMT, among top gainers on Europe's benchmark STOXX ‌600 index.

More from Yahoo Scout

How much revenue does STMicroelectronics expect by 2026?

What specific AI infrastructure does STMicroelectronics focus on?

What factors are driving STMicroelectronics' capacity expansion progress?

Why did STMicroelectronics raise its data centre revenue target?

STMicro now expects ⁠data centre revenue of about $1 billion in 2026, compared with its previous forecast for ⁠revenue "nicely above" $500 million.

"Assuming the current dynamic continues and with the current engagements we have, revenues could double in 2027," ​it said ​in a statement, having ​previously targeted revenue "well above $1 ‌billion" for next year.

Jefferies analysts estimated that data centres alone would contribute around 7% growth to 2027 revenue, out of their overall 20.5% growth forecast.

STMicro's data centre exposure is focused less on the graphics processors that train ‌AI models and more on ​the surrounding infrastructure needed to power ​and manage them.

The ​company said the higher revenue target also ‌reflected progress in factory ramping ​capacity.

"The new guidance ​on AI likely results in estimates rising in both years though we would think that estimates will ​rise more ‌in 2027 than in 2026," J.P. Morgan analysts ​said in a note.

(Reporting by Nathan Vifflin in ​Gdansk, editing by Milla Nissi-Prussak)

news.AI_Summary:
• STMicroelectronics (STM) has raised its data center revenue target to approximately $1 billion for 2026, up from over $500 million.
• The company anticipates revenues could double in 2027, reaching well above $1 billion, driven by continued strong AI infrastructure demand.
• STM's focus is on the surrounding infrastructure for AI models rather than the graphics processors used for training.
• The increased revenue target reflects progress in expanding factory capacity to meet demand.
news.Keywords: data center, AI infrastructure, revenue target, capacity expansion, chipmaker

• 輝達(NVIDIA)與聯發科(2454)、台積電(2330)合作開發的新一代AI PC晶片「N1X」問世，有望重新定義AI PC架構，帶動記憶體新需求。
• N1X整合ARM架構與輝達GPU，採用台積電3奈米製程，具備高效能與低功耗，將使AI功能真正進入個人電腦平台。
• AI Agent運算能力可能成為下一世代平台交替的關鍵，企業與個人對本地端AI運算需求將增加。
• 預期至2028年AI PC換機潮將帶動DRAM與SSD需求成長，十銓(4967)企業級與工控市場比重維持高檔。
• 高階AI PC系統價格仍高，初期以企業與專業工作站市場為主，未來記憶體在系統成本中占比將提高。
news.Keywords: AI PC,N1X晶片,記憶體需求,本地端運算,平台世代交替

news.Title: 台股衝上4萬5過熱？中經院長坦言「漲太快」　示警1隱憂：修正幅度恐比想像更大
news.Content: AI熱潮持續延燒，帶動台股多頭行情全面噴發，指數不僅接連站上3萬點、4萬點大關， 現在更直接衝破4萬5000點 。外界開始關注，漲勢是否過熱。對此 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 中經院院長連賢明坦言股市漲勢「漲太快」，認為金融市場過熱後往往伴隨修正風險，幅度可能比想像更大。
• 台灣第一季經濟成長率上修至14.55%，顯示景氣熱絡，AI帶動出口、投資及企業獲利成長是主要動能。
• 對於台股從3萬點飆升至4萬5千點是否有過熱或泡沫化風險，連賢明表示難以定論，但過熱後修正為常態。
• PMI與NMI數據顯示台灣景氣處於熱絡階段，但投資人應留意潛在波動與修正風險。

news.Keywords: 股市過熱,經濟成長,修正風險,AI泡沫,市場預期

news.Title: Arm：AGI CPU有賴台灣供應鏈，第2、3代規劃開發中
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 12:33:34 黃立安 發佈

半導體IP大廠Arm執行長Rene Haas（附圖）今（2）日舉行主題演講時表示，Arm AGI CPU已由台積電（2330）進行量產，同時強 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm執行長Rene Haas表示，AGI CPU已由台積電（2330）量產，並強調其產品建立在台灣供應鏈基礎上。
• Arm的第二、三代AGI CPU產品已分別進入開發及規劃階段，將持續朝向更多核心、更高能效及更佳能源效率推進。
• Arm AGI CPU提供兩種系統配置，風冷機櫃方案功耗約36kW可提供約8,000個核心，液冷機櫃方案功耗約200kW可提供超過25,000個核心。
• Arm已從IP供應商轉型為端到端解決方案供應商，並與Google、Amazon、NVIDIA等Hyperscaler合作。
• Rene Haas強調「沒有台灣，就沒有Arm」，並表示未來將持續與台灣夥伴深化合作，共同推動下一世代AI運算發展。
news.Keywords: AI CPU, 台灣供應鏈, 半導體, 營運策略, 合作夥伴

news.Title: 台股狂拉578點竟是誘多！盤中爆量黑K引爆逃命潮「全靠台積電、鴻海浴血撐盤」2大族群逆勢也被買爆
news.Content:
在美國發動空襲及以色列於黎巴嫩展開軍事行動後，伊朗宣布暫停透過第三方與美國談判，使中東局勢再度緊張，避險資金因而回流美元，紐約原油價格大漲，使得國際風險胃口在上半場激情後迅速降溫，壓抑亞股表現，台股也難逃一劫。

加權指 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 台積電（2330）盤中維持抗跌，鴻海（2317）受惠AI伺服器題材支撐，但聯發科（2454）、台達電（2308）等權值股表現疲弱。

news.Title: Applied Materials (AMAT) Can’t Keep Up With Demand, Says Jim Cramer
news.Content: We recently published Jim Cramer Warned About Market Manipulation & Discussed These 22 Stocks . Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Semiconductor manufacturing equipment provider Applied Materials, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMAT) is one of the most crucial stocks in the AI era ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Argus maintained a 'Buy' rating with a $500 price target, citing strong long-term AI chip demand.

news.Title: Jim Cramer Discusses Amazon.com (AMZN) & Rocket Explosion
news.Content: We recently published Jim Cramer Warned About Market Manipulation & Discussed These 22 Stocks . Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. eCommerce and cloud computing giant Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN)’s shares are up by 32% over the past year and by 19% year-to-date. Bank of America discussed the firm on May 21st as it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon.com (AMZN) shares are up 32% year-over-year, with Bank of America maintaining a 'Buy' rating and $310 price target.
• Factors supporting the stock include AI demand impacting its cloud computing business (AWS), increasing profitability, and a growing backlog.
• A setback occurred with the explosion of Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket, which carried internet satellites, potentially impacting Amazon's satellite launch timeline.
• Artisan Value Fund initiated a significant position in Amazon, viewing it as a high-quality franchise with substantial long-term earnings power, driven by its logistics network and AWS, despite current heavy reinvestment.
news.Keywords: eCommerce, cloud computing, AWS, satellite launch, capital expenditures

news.Title: Jim Cramer Discusses Why Micron’s (MU) Important
news.Content: We recently published Jim Cramer Warned About Market Manipulation & Discussed These 22 Stocks . Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Memory chip manufacturer Micron Technology, Inc. (NASDAQ:MU) is one of the hottest stocks on Wall Street. Its shares are up ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) is experiencing significant stock appreciation, up 927% over the past year and 207% year-to-date, driven by its critical role in AI infrastructure.
• Barclays and UBS raised their price targets significantly, reflecting strong demand for memory chips, particularly high-bandwidth memory (HBM), which is a bottleneck in AI data centers.
• CEO Sanjay Mehrotra acknowledges the inability to meet current demand for HBM, emphasizing its importance for AI.
• While MU is a major AI beneficiary with surging demand, its highly cyclical and capital-intensive nature suggests potential for violent profitability swings despite current revenue and margin drivers.
news.Keywords: memory chips, AI buildout, high-bandwidth memory (HBM), supply constraints, cyclicality

news.Title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Loses 8.8% on Nvidia Competition Fears
news.Content: Qualcomm Inc. (NASDAQ:QCOM) is one of the 10 Stocks Entering June in the Wrong Direction. Qualcomm snapped a two-day winning streak on Monday, shedding 8.78 percent to finish at ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Nvidia unveiled the RTX Spark superchip, co-developed with Microsoft, targeting the PC and devices market, posing a competitive threat to Qualcomm's Snapdragon processors.
• The decline is also attributed to investors taking profits after the stock's 44.7% growth from April's closing price to its recent all-time high.
• Qualcomm is scheduled to pay a dividend of $0.92 per share on June 25 to shareholders of record as of June 4.
news.Keywords: competitive threat, profit-taking, semiconductor market, dividend, processor technology

news.Content: AI 晶片巨頭輝達執行長黃仁勳今 (2) 日受訪時表示，他會盡可能支付員工最高薪 ...
news.AI_Summary:

• 此番言論凸顯AI時代半導體產業對人才的高度需求及薪酬競爭的白熱化。

news.Title: Why Nvidia, Arm, and Other Tech Stocks Popped Today
news.Content: Shares of Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Arm Holdings (NASDAQ: ARM) rose sharply on Monday, as investors celebrated the launch of their game-changing new computer processor. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia and Arm Holdings (ARM) shares surged following the launch of their new RTX Spark superchip, designed for AI-powered PCs.
• Nvidia is expanding its focus from GPUs for AI data centers to CPUs for personal computers, aiming to capture a significant portion of the $200 billion CPU market.
• The RTX Spark combines Nvidia's Blackwell GPU with Arm's Grace CPU architecture, developed in partnership with Microsoft to enable AI agents on Windows PCs.
• This new chip technology promises industry-leading energy efficiency, fast memory, and high-performance graphics, with devices from Dell, HP, Lenovo, and ASUS expected this fall.
news.Keywords: AI PCs, CPU market, GPU, chip architecture, strategic expansion

news.Title: 台股狂飆衝破45000點新高！中經院示警回檔風險　一票人嗆：2萬時就留意了
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者林子云／綜合報導

台股在AI題材帶動下衝破4萬5千點大關，再創歷史新高。對此，中華經濟研究院院長連賢明指 ...

news.Title: 台股美股齊漲！他問資產配置必要性　網喊：多頭就是All in
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者王保伶／綜合報導

隨著台股與美股持續走強，市場持續熱絡，不少投資人迅速累積資產，進而帶動關於「資產配置」的討論。一名網友發文指出，在近2個月不斷上漲的行情下，原先設定的股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 近期台股與美股持續走強，引發關於資產配置必要性的討論。
• 部分投資人認為在多頭市場應提高股票曝險，採取「All in」或槓桿ETF策略。
• 另有投資人堅持資產配置以進行風險控管，透過每月新增資金進行再平衡。
• AI與科技股帶動的行情下，部分資金集中於元大台灣50（0050）、台積電（2330）等標的。
news.Keywords: 資產配置,再平衡,多頭市場,風險控管,報酬率

news.Title: Why Innodata Stock Skyrocketed 149% in May
news.Content: Innodata (NASDAQ: INOD) was one of several AI stocks to soar last month as the data-labeling specialist nearly doubled following its first-quarter earnings report early in the month, and the stock added on some gains from there. Sentiment toward AI stocks has shifted ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Innodata (INOD) stock surged 149% in May, primarily driven by its first-quarter earnings report and strong performance in the AI sector.
• The company reported a 54% revenue increase to $90.1 million, significantly beating estimates, and saw adjusted EBITDA jump 96% to $25 million (28% of revenue).
• Innodata secured new engagements with a major tech company, projected to generate $51 million in revenue this year, becoming its second-largest customer.
• The company raised its full-year revenue growth guidance to at least 40% and is trading at a high P/E ratio, reflecting investor optimism about its AI-driven growth potential.
news.Keywords: AI stocks, revenue growth, margin expansion, EBITDA, guidance increase

news.Title: 柏瑞投信：透過GIANT投資術，掌握台股AI產業升級投資契機
news.Content: 隨著AI技術持續深化並加速落地，全球科技產業進入新一輪成長週期。柏瑞投信表示，儘管短期仍有美國聯準會(Fed)利率政策前景未定，以及國際地緣政治持續動盪的不確定性存在，但是台股在AI產業鏈扮演關鍵角色地位的支撐下，企 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 柏瑞投信指出，儘管面臨利率政策與地緣政治的不確定性，台股在AI產業鏈扮演關鍵角色，企業獲利結構持續優化。
• 受惠於全球供應鏈重組與AI產業崛起，台股近年表現優於新興市場，資金聚焦半導體與伺服器相關AI供應鏈。
• 柏瑞投信建議透過GIANT投資術，從成長潛力、收益、品質、潛力及趨勢五大面向掌握台股AI產業投資機會。
• 柏瑞巨人基金推出後收N9級別，降低長期投資成本，並強調AI時代下台股的成長契機與風險控管。
news.Keywords: AI產業,台股,投資契機,GIANT投資術,風險控管

news.Title: 黃仁勳今舉行媒體問答 蔡力行驚喜現身
news.Content: 輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳今（2）日於台北舉行媒體問答會，而聯發科執行長蔡力行也驚喜現身，並與黃仁勳 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳與聯發科執行長蔡力行一同出席媒體問答會，黃仁勳讚揚聯發科的工程技術世界一流。
• 雙方合作開發的RTX Spark超級晶片，採用台積電3奈米製程，整合輝達GPU與聯發科CPU，專為個人代理打造。
• RTX Spark晶片採用Arm架構，提升運算效能與AI應用能量，是輝達與聯發科在AI超級電腦後又一深度合作。
• 此合作象徵聯發科正式進軍Windows PC市場，未來將持續推動AI與高效運算領域創新。
news.Keywords: AI PC,GPU,CPU,合作夥伴,技術創新

news.Title: The Best Way to Invest in the SpaceX IPO Is Hiding in Plain Sight
news.Content: In anticipation of its initial public offering (IPO) on June 12, SpaceX filed its initial registration statement (Form S-1) with the Securities and Exchange Commission on May 20. The report gave investors never-before-seen access to SpaceX's inner workings, including its long-term growth plans, customer base, and more. SpaceX plans to list its Class A common stock on the Nasdaq and Nasdaq Texas under the ticker symbol SPCX. But there are ways to gain exposure to SpaceX besides buying the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX filed its IPO registration statement, planning to list on the Nasdaq under the ticker SPCX on June 12.
• The company operates Starlink satellites, dominates the commercial space launch industry, and owns xAI and the social media platform X.
• SpaceX generated $18.67 billion in revenue in 2025 but reported a $2.59 billion net loss, largely due to R&D expenses.
• At a potential $1.75 trillion valuation, SpaceX's IPO valuation would be approximately 94 times sales, raising concerns about its P/E ratio and potential underperformance relative to the S&P 500.
news.Keywords: IPO, satellite communications, space launch, valuation, R&D investment

news.Title: Rivian just achieved something Tesla has long dominated
news.Content: Tesla (TSLA) has developed one of the most important advantages in the electric vehicle (EV) industry over the years. The corporation doesn’t only move a lot of EVs. It has also been a benchmark for maximizing the driving range from every kilowatt-hour of battery capacity. It matters to drivers who weigh range, charge time and ownership expenses. It's also important to investors. An EV that is more efficient can offer a competitive range without a big battery pack. That can help the automakers decrease expenses, protect margins and price cars more aggressively. Tesla has had that edge for years, particularly ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rivian's new R2 SUV matches Tesla Model Y's efficiency rating of 105 MPGe and 32 kWh/100 miles.
• The Rivian R2 Performance offers a longer range of 330 miles compared to the Tesla Model Y Performance's 306 miles.
• Pricing for the Rivian R2 Performance with Launch Package is nearly identical to the Tesla Model Y Performance, starting at $57,990 vs $57,490.
• The R2's design is more robust and heavier than the Model Y, making its competitive efficiency a significant technical achievement for Rivian.
news.Keywords: EV efficiency, range comparison, competitive landscape, performance metrics, automotive technology

news.Title: 記憶體雙雄活跳跳！華邦電亮燈漲停 南亞科突破400元大關雙創新高
news.Content: 受惠AI推論需求持續升溫，加上DRAM價格漲勢延續，記憶體雙雄今（2）日股價表現強勁，華邦電（2344）開盤不到 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠於AI推論需求升溫及DRAM價格上漲，華邦電（2344）亮燈漲停，南亞科（2408）股價創歷史新高。
• 華邦電4月自結獲利亮眼，稅後淨利74.88億元，每股盈餘1.66元，超越2024及2025年總和。
• 研調機構TrendForce指出，第一季DRAM合約價季增93-98%，整體營收季成長81%。
• 預期第二季DRAM出貨位元增幅有限，合約價仍可望季增58-63%，因原廠庫存低且優先供應AI伺服器。
news.Keywords: DRAM,AI伺服器,記憶體,漲價趨勢,營收成長

news.Title: Blue Origin launch pad repairs could take 'serious time', NASA chief tells CNBC
news.Content: June 1 (Reuters) - Damage to a Blue Origin launch pad from the spectacular explosion of the company's giant New Glenn rocket ‌during a test firing of its engines last week will "take ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Damage to Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket launch pad from a test firing explosion will require significant repair time, potentially extending to 2028.
• The explosion occurred during a static hot-fire test, causing extensive damage described as 'practically destroyed' by sources.
• This incident impacts Jeff Bezos's ambitions to compete with SpaceX in the private space launch market.
• The New Glenn rocket is crucial for NASA's Artemis moon missions, and the delay raises concerns about mission timelines.
news.Keywords: launch pad damage, rocket explosion, space launch, Artemis mission, operational delay

news.Title: 黃仁勳證實AI PC平台就是NVIDIA RTX Spark AI PC，聯發科是重要夥伴
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳，在今早的媒體問答記者會中，邀來了聯發科(2454)執行長蔡力行，證實了市場傳言許久的N1/N1X的AI PC平台確實存在，就是NVIDIA RTX Spark AI PC。至於聯 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳證實，NVIDIA RTX Spark AI PC平台為市場傳言的N1/N1X AI PC平台，聯發科是其重要夥伴。
• 聯發科將從手機SoC供應商升級為NVIDIA AI PC平台共同架構夥伴，負責CPU SoC。
• 黃仁勳闡述AI PC架構為CPU+GPU+Memory整合，CPU負責工作調度，GPU負責AI推理，此架構稱為『Harness』。
• 聯發科執行長蔡力行表示，聯發科負責CPU，具備多媒體引擎、低功耗設計與能源效率；輝達提供GPU、CUDA等軟體生態系。
news.Keywords: AI PC,CPU,GPU,合作夥伴,平台架構

news.Title: 南亞科攻AI迎結構性成長，新廠拚2027年H2量產
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 09:58:41 數位內容中心 發佈

受到AI伺服器、AI PC、AI手機與邊緣運算需求帶動，南亞科（2408）已由傳統景氣循環型產業轉向結構性成長模式，記憶體產品組合正朝高容量 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受AI伺服器、PC、手機及邊緣運算需求帶動，南亞科（2408）已轉向結構性成長模式，調整產品組合朝高容量、高頻寬伺服器導向。
• 公司AI應用提升對HBM、DDR5與高容量LPDDR需求，10奈米級第二代（1B）製程已量產DDR5/DDR4，並計畫推出LPDDR產品。
• 南亞科規劃新廠於2027年下半年量產，預期顯著提升月產能；私募增資約787億元將用於先進記憶體製造與設備投資。
• 預估DRAM供需吃緊情況可能持續至2027年底，客戶已要求簽訂長期供貨合約，南亞科與多家國際AI客戶洽談合作機會。
news.Keywords: AI應用,DRAM,HBM,伺服器記憶體,結構性成長

news.Title: 與蔡力行同台談N1X新晶片　黃仁勳：將長期擴展此架構
news.Content: （中央社記者吳家豪台北2026年06月2日電）輝達（NVIDIA）執行長黃仁勳今天舉行全球媒體問答，與聯發科 (2454 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳與聯發科執行長蔡力行同台，討論雙方合作的Arm架構N1X晶片，黃仁勳表示將長期擴展此架構。
• N1X晶片專為個人AI代理打造，將搭載於RTX Spark系列Windows PC，聯發科負責設計客製化CPU。
• 黃仁勳表示，選擇與聯發科合作是因為其世界一流的工程技術，雙方投入數百名工程師合作近2年。
• 為滿足AI代理在裝置端運行的需求，需要高頻寬、低延遲、低功耗的SoC，輝達與微軟合作確保Windows相容性。
news.Keywords: AI晶片,CPU,SoC,合作夥伴,架構擴展

news.Title: Apple's WWDC Is June 8. Here's the 1 Announcement That Could Move the Stock
news.Content: Apple (NASDAQ: AAPL) opens its Worldwide Developers Conference on June 8, and the keynote carries real weight for the stock. The company heads into the event trading near all-time highs, having climbed more than 50% over the past year -- and a good chunk of that run rests on a single expectation: that Apple is finally ready to show an artificial intelligence (AI) -powered ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple's WWDC on June 8th is critical, with expectations high for an AI-powered Siri update (iOS 27).
• The new Siri is reportedly leveraging Google's Gemini model, with Apple potentially paying $1 billion annually for access.
• Apple's premium valuation (P/E of 37) assumes successful AI integration driving upgrades and services revenue from its 2.5 billion active devices.
• Recent strong financial performance includes 17% YoY revenue growth to $111.2 billion in Q2, with Services revenue up 16% to $31 billion (gross margin >75%).
• Despite strong financials, a disappointing AI announcement could negatively impact the stock, while success could drive further gains.
news.Keywords: AI strategy, Siri update, developer conference, revenue growth, services margin

news.Title: 重押台積電！40％資金買「4大巨頭」 神級操盤手私藏股
news.Content: 人工智慧狂潮，推升供應鏈股價水漲船高，華爾街低調的神級操盤手Light Street Capital創辦人Glen Kacher重押40%資金 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 華爾街操盤手Glen Kacher將40%資金重押AI概念股，包括輝達、台積電、博通及超微，其中台積電佔比14.4%。
• Glen Kacher旗下基金績效亮眼，2023年報酬率45.7%，2024年上半年衝上59.4%。
• 台積電在先進晶片生產上具實質壟斷地位，是該操盤手最大持股；其亦看好輝達作為AI基礎設施之王。
• 博通在ASIC技術和資料中心網路領域領先，超微則在資料中心CPU領域具優勢，兩者均有巨大成長前景。
news.Keywords: AI概念股,半導體,投資組合,成長前景,市場壟斷

news.Title: 〈台股開盤〉AI開趴接著奏樂接著舞 漲逾500點創45915點新高後一度翻黑
news.Content: 輝達 (NVDA-US) 執行長黃仁勳在台北國際電腦展 (COMPUTEX) 主題演講中正式發表 RTX Spark 超級晶片，市場看好 AI PC 將成為下一波成長引擎，激勵輝達股價大漲 6.26%，並帶動台股在 AI 盛宴帶領下開高 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達發表RTX Spark超級晶片，看好AI PC成為下一波成長引擎，激勵台股開盤大漲逾500點，創45915點新高後一度翻黑。
• 早盤台積電上漲1.27%至2385元，最高觸及2400元；鴻海上漲1.36%。
• 分析師指出，台股主要格局偏多，儘管追價力道不足，拉回仍獲短期均線支撐，技術指標持續向上。
• 美股方面，輝達大漲6.26%帶動費城半導體指數上漲1.06%，道瓊、那斯達克及S&P 500指數同步收紅。
news.Keywords: AI PC,台股,指數創新高,權值股,半導體指數

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】黃仁勳點火台股漲逾500點至45915點 分析師張家豪曝攻4萬6關鍵
news.Content: 輝達執行長黃仁勳在COMPUTEX 2026 發表新一代 AI PC 晶片，激勵輝達股價大漲逾6%，帶動美股四大指數同步收紅。受利多激勵，台股今（2）日開盤後一度大漲逾500點、衝上45,915點，不過 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳發表新一代AI PC晶片，激勵輝達股價大漲逾6%，帶動台股開盤一度大漲逾500點至45,915點。
• 分析師張家豪指出，台股維持強勢多頭格局，若權王台積電（2330）穩步墊高，指數有機會挑戰46,000點。
• 目前台股進入KD高檔鈍化，預期後續仍有強勁攻擊行情，清明節後到端午節前為台股獲利佳區間。
• 記憶體族群受Computex題材影響資金流向AI股，但長期缺貨情況難緩解，產業趨勢維持向上。
news.Keywords: AI PC,台股,多頭格局,台積電,記憶體

news.Title: 2張椅子藏伏筆！黃仁勳全球記者會「蔡力行站台」親揭RTX Spark秘辛
news.Content: 輝達執行長黃仁勳今（2）日一早在台北漢來大飯店舉行全球媒體問答，活動開場前，現場即擺放2張椅子，引發媒體猜測是否會有神秘嘉賓到場。最後時刻，聯發科副董事長暨執行長蔡力行驚喜現身，與黃仁勳同台對談，兩人也親自揭露雙方攜手 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳與聯發科副董事長蔡力行共同揭露雙方合作打造的新一代AI PC超級晶片RTX Spark。
• RTX Spark 結合聯發科的CPU、低功耗與多媒體技術，以及輝達的GPU、CUDA、Tensor Core與AI運算優勢。
• 該晶片採用台積電3奈米製程，搭載Blackwell RTX GPU及聯發科設計的20核心Grace CPU (代號N1X)，並透過MD-Link實現高頻寬、低延遲的統一記憶體架構。
• 黃仁勳強調，RTX Spark 的開發過程中，NVLink晶片對晶片互連技術是關鍵，且必須導入，而非傳統PCI Express架構。

news.Title: 黃仁勳：Vera Rubin供應鏈已全啟動仍難追上需求，強調Vera非傳統CPU
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】在NVIDIA執行長黃仁勳今早的媒體問題記者會中證實，NVIDIA仍然供不應求，而下一代AI平台的Vera Rub ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 輝達執行長黃仁勳證實，下一代AI平台Vera Rubin的供應鏈已啟動，但整體需求仍供不應求。
• Vera Rubin 供應鏈涵蓋SK海力士、美光、三星（HBM）、台積電（CoWoS、Silicon Photonics）、矽品（先進封測）、聯鈞、上詮、光聖、波若威（Silicon Photonics）、貿聯及嘉澤（Connectors）。
• 黃仁勳強調Vera Rubin並非傳統CPU，而是專為AI Agent設計，其單執行緒性能有25年來最大突破，能應對Agent工作模式所需之即時決策、Tool Calling、記憶體管理與推理控制。
• 黃仁勳表示，輝達雖有足夠供應支撐強勁成長，但仍處於供給受限（supply constrained）狀態。
news.Keywords: AI平台,供應鏈,供不應求,AI Agent,單執行緒性能

news.Title: Why AMD Stock Soared 46% in May
news.Content: Shares of Advanced Micro Devices (NASDAQ: AMD) , which primarily makes central processing units (CPUs) for various applications and graphics processing units (GPUs) for enabling artificial intelligence (AI) in data centers, soared 45.6% in May, according to data from S&P Global Market Intelligence . ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) stock surged 45.6% in May and 74% in April, significantly outperforming Nvidia and the broader market.
• Q1 revenue reached $10.3 billion (up 38% YoY), driven by a 57% increase in the Data Center segment to $5.8 billion, fueled by EPYC CPUs and Instinct GPUs.
• GAAP EPS jumped 91% to $0.84, and adjusted EPS was $1.37 (up 43% YoY), beating analyst expectations.
• AMD forecasts Q2 revenue of approximately $11.2 billion (up 46% YoY) with an adjusted gross margin of 56%.
• The company highlights strong momentum in AI infrastructure, with accelerating demand for high-performance CPUs and GPUs.
news.Keywords: stock performance, revenue growth, data center, AI infrastructure, forward guidance

news.Title: 台股漲436點 台積電漲40元 記憶體「2檔」噴7%
news.Content:
輝達執行長黃仁勳舉辦的GTC主題演講，讓AI帶領台股持續延燒，台股今（2）日早盤開高震盪，上漲436點，來到45805點創新高，漲幅1.02%，預估成交量1.4兆，櫃買指數則開高震盪，早盤來到447.87點，上漲1.85點，漲幅0.37%。

權值股中，台積電早盤開高震盪，來到2395元，上漲40元，漲幅1.7%，鴻海早盤來到294元，漲0.5元，漲幅0.17%，台達電來到2430元，漲10元，漲幅0.41%，聯發科來到4805元，漲250元，漲幅5.49%。

PC概念股也同步上揚，仁寶、華碩、宏碁、緯創開盤就攻上漲停，其中，仁寶已連拉三根漲停板，微星也有5%的漲幅。

記憶體族群則延續強勁的走勢，華邦電來到181元，漲幅逾7%，南亞科來到410元，漲幅7.44%，旺宏來到174.元，漲幅4.18%，晶豪科也有逾4%的漲幅。

台塑四寶中，南亞轉型電子材料受到市場關注，繼昨日漲停後今天再度帶量衝高，股價來到114.5元續創波段新高，台化則來到55.2元，也又逾2%的漲幅。

（封面圖／東森新聞）

news.Title: 美股收高激勵！台股早盤大漲527點　台積電開2390元
news.Content:
即時中心／綜合報導

投資人一方面關注美伊談判進展，一方面看好輝達發布全新個人電腦晶片，進一步提振市場信心，美股主要指數週一（1日）小幅上漲；台指期盤後也上漲505點。台股今（2）日開盤小漲51.02點、以45,388.93點開出，隨後指數衝高，目前指數上漲527.36點、來到45,865.27點。台積電ADR收盤上揚4.11％，台積電（2330）今以2390元開出、上漲35元。

電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）開298.5元，漲4元；聯發科（2454）以4,970元開出，上漲415元；廣達（2382）開375元，漲2.5元；台達電（2308）以2,430元開出，漲10元；日月光投控（3711）開600元，跌1元；聯電（2303）開147元，漲1元；大立光（3008）開3,780元，跌55元。

金融方面，富邦金（2881）以110.5元平盤開出；國泰金（2882）開88.5元，漲0.3元；中信金（2891）跌0.1元，以62元開出；兆豐金（2886）跌0.25元，開41.2元；華南金（2880）開32.5元，跌0.35元；第一金（2892）開平盤27.75元；合庫金（5880）小跌0.05元，以22.8元開出。

《民視新聞網》提醒您：內容僅供參考，投資人於決策時應審慎評估風險，並就投資結果自行負責。

news.Content:
台股昨（1日）衝上45K大關之後，資金狂潮未歇，今（2日）早盤以45388.93點開出，隨後大漲超過500點，台積電上漲40元觸及2395元，聯發科續飆逾5%，台達電同步上漲10元，觸及2430元。

受惠於電腦展題材與輝達進軍AI PC市場，電子五哥仍吸金，仁寶續飆漲停44.35元，緯創大漲逾7%，英業達與和碩上漲超過2%，廣達小漲近1%。PC品牌廠華碩與宏碁飆上漲停，微星也上漲超過3%。

黃仁勳昨於GTC Taipei主題演講上釋出利多，攜手聯發科推出「RTX Spark」晶片，正式進軍AI PC市場。同時，黃仁勳也宣告新一代AI平台Vera Rubin全面量產，公開全球首個開源物理AI模型Cosmos 3，以及AI工廠、企業Agent布局。

周一輝達股價大漲6.26%，收在224.36美元，台積電ADR上漲17.18美元（或4.11%）至435.63美元，鴻海ADR也大漲5.43%收在19.22美元。輝達競爭對手超微下跌1.16%至510.13美元，英特爾走低4.67%至109.33美元，高通重挫8.78%至228.99美元。

台股接連創新高，朝5萬點大關邁進。展望後市，工商報導，統一投顧董事長黎方國表示，全世界對AI的需求太強勁，這是實打實的投資與訂單，最大受惠的國家依序為美國、台灣與韓國，這股AI浪潮會一路延續到2030年，預測台股最快6月底前有挑戰5萬點大關的機會。

即使不斷挑戰紀錄，但居高思危想法不可少，中經院院長連賢明昨示警，股市漲勢超出市場預期，通常金融市場過熱後，修正風險會隨之而來，且修正幅度會比想像更大，要留意潛在的波動。

news.Title: 聯發科狂噴9%！台積電漲40元至2395元　台股開高漲541點「闖45800點大關」
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]記者薛明峻／台北報導

儘管油價走升，在AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）強漲6.26%帶動下，美股四大指數周一全面收紅，道瓊、那斯達克、標普500均改寫歷史新高，費半更勁揚1.06%；台積電ADR則大漲4.11%，推升台股今（2）日開高上漲51.02點至45388.93點，隨著台積電漲40元至2395元，聯發科大漲9%，加權指數一度衝上45879.58點，大漲541.67點。

五大電子權值股中，權王台積電（2330）開高漲35元至2390元，一度漲40元至2395元，漲幅1.70%；台達電（2308）開高漲10元至2430元，一度漲20元至2440元，漲幅0.83%，隨後翻黑；聯發科（2454）開高漲415元至4970元，漲幅9.11%，高檔震盪；鴻海（2317）開高漲4元至297.5元，一度漲6元至299.5元，漲幅2.04%；日月光投控（3711）則以600元開出，下跌1元，隨後翻紅漲7元至608元，漲幅1.16%。

news.Title: 蔡力行現身黃仁勳記者會，同台暢談N1X晶片合作
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 09:07:33 黃立安 發佈

輝達(NVIDIA)執行長黃仁勳今(2)日舉行全球記者會，聯發科(2454)執行長蔡力行驚喜現身，雙方同台對談共同開發的N1X晶片。黃仁勳(圖左)表示，當初希望打造一顆完整支援Windows、專為AI時代設計的新型電腦晶片，因此第一時間便想到在低功耗SoC設計領域具深厚實力的聯發科。

黃仁勳指出，雙方投入數百位工程師、合作超過兩年，共同打造具統一記憶體架構的N1X晶片，透過高頻寬互連技術，CPU、GPU與Tensor Core皆可直接存取記憶體，不僅具備優異能源效率，也可100%相容Windows、CUDA及NVIDIA Tensor Core生態系。

蔡力行則表示，這是一段非常精彩的旅程，但過程並不容易，尤其相容性相關工作需要投入大量工程資源與技術能力。他指出，聯發科擅長打造低功耗、高效能CPU，搭配NVIDIA GPU後展現出相當亮眼的成果。

現場黃仁勳也笑問蔡力行「我們還是朋友嗎？」蔡力行則回應「永遠都是」。蔡力行透露，黃仁勳過去曾強調「不能妥協，必須做出真正偉大的產品」，也促使雙方持續挑戰既有架構限制，打造更適合AI時代的運算平台。

黃仁勳進一步表示，N1X也與Microsoft密切合作，成為史上Windows相容性及x86模擬相容性最佳的晶片之一，同時也是目前全球唯一完整支援OpenGL全系列版本的行動晶片，可順利執行CATIA、Ansys等專業工程軟體。

蔡力行表示，近期與客戶交流時已感受到市場高度期待，有客戶甚至形容這項產品讓產業重新獲得新生命。他強調，對聯發科而言，能與NVIDIA這樣的世界級企業合作意義重大，雙方不只是打造產品，更共同創造具突破性的創新成果，未來也期待持續深化合作。

群聯攜手Intel攻AI PC，aiDAPTIV突破記憶體限制

《GTC Taipei》黃仁勳：Agentic AI來臨，VR為輝達最具野心計畫

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 〈COMPUTEX〉輝達全球媒體問答 聯發科蔡力行驚喜現身 大談未來N2X
news.Content:
輝達 (NVDA-US) 執行長黃仁勳今 (2) 日舉辦全球媒體問答，聯發科 (2454-TW) 執行長蔡力行驚喜現身，雙方談論一起合作 N1X 的旅程，並透露 N2X、N3X 已經在進行中，將持續拓展雙方的相關業務。

黃仁勳指出，輝達選擇聯發科合作的原因，就是因為聯發科在各方面的工程能力都是世界級的，而這點已經透過這次合作被證實。

蔡力行接著表示，雙方合作這是一項龐大的工作，但他非常興奮，前一天聽完黃仁勳的主題演講後，感覺非常振奮，因為 PC 似乎在 40 年後迎來了新的生命，這套架構由 CPU 與 GPU 透過高速連結串接，並採用統一記憶體架構，是非常適合 Agentic AI 的正確架構，也能支援遊戲等應用。

蔡力行也表示，聯發科團隊與輝達團隊都非常興奮，特別感謝輝達工程團隊，感謝雙方在合作中非常大方，也帶來很高的挑戰。

news.Title: 台股早盤漲逾500點 台積電漲45元
news.Content:
美股4大指數1日收盤創新高，台北股市今天（2日）開盤漲51.02點，加權股價指數為45388.93點，成交金額新台幣191.78億元。早盤最高漲541.67點，加權指數為45879.58點。台積電漲45元，達2400元。

其他權值股早盤表現，鴻海上漲5元，為298.5元，聯發科上漲275元，為4830元；台達電為2420元平盤。

電子類股指數上漲0.96%、金融類股指數下跌0.17%，代表中小型股票的櫃買指數上漲0.55%。

台股昨天收在45337.91點，美股四大指數道瓊工業指數小漲46.42點或0.09%，收51078.88點；標準普爾500指數小升19.90點或0.26%，收7599.96點；那斯達克指數上揚114.19點或0.42%，收27086.81點；費城半導體指數揚升136.27點或1.06%，收12965.65點。AI晶片龍頭輝達（NVDA-US）上漲6.26%、台積電ADR上漲4.11%。

news.Title: TSMC executive drops blunt message on AI chip’s next frontier
news.Content: Wall Street has spent years pricing AI chip stocks on one core assumption: raw computing power wins. More transistors, more speed, more performance. That was the race, and investors bid up names including Nvidia (NVDA), Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM), and Broadcom (AVGO) accordingly. Kevin Zhang , senior vice president of business development at TSMC, just challenged that assumption directly. Speaking to reporters at a conference in Amsterdam on May 28, Zhang said the thing TSMC’s customers are demanding above all else right now is not more horsepower. It is energy efficiency. “The area customers most want improvement in is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TSMC's executive Kevin Zhang stated that customer demand is prioritizing energy efficiency over raw computing power for AI chips.
• This shift challenges the long-held assumption that more transistors and speed are the primary drivers of AI chip value.
• Data center operators face constraints from electricity costs, grid limitations, and heat management, making efficiency critical.
• TSMC is focusing on advanced packaging, chip stacking, and photonics to improve efficiency, alongside node advancements.
• The company expects its chips to reduce power consumption by up to 30% while increasing performance by over 20% with its N2 and A14 generations.
news.Keywords: energy efficiency, AI chips, semiconductor manufacturing, TSMC, customer demand

news.Title: These Linked Stocks Are 2 of the Best Ways to Play the Ongoing AI Boom
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) market is booming, with both AI infrastructure and cloud computing providers seeing huge growth. Two of the companies at the forefront of this charge are Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOGL) (NASDAQ: GOOG) and Broadcom (NASDAQ: AVGO) , which just so happen to have co-developed Alphabet's well-renowned Tensor Processing Units (TPUs). TPUs link Alphabet and Broadcom together and have been a huge part of their success. These ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (GOOGL) and Broadcom (AVGO) have co-developed Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), a key driver of their AI success.
• Alphabet's TPUs provide a cost advantage for AI model training and inference, contributing to a 63% surge in cloud revenue to $20 billion in Q1.
• Alphabet's cloud backlog reached $460 billion, and it now allows select customers to order TPUs via Broadcom.
• Broadcom records TPU revenue and expects over $100 billion in ASIC revenue by FY2027, with Anthropic placing a significant $21 billion order.
• The partnership leverages Alphabet's chip design and Broadcom's IP and integration expertise, positioning both for long-term AI growth.
news.Keywords: TPU development, AI infrastructure, cloud computing, custom ASICs, revenue growth

news.Title: Is Analog Devices Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
news.Content: With a market cap of $201.6 billion, Analog Devices, Inc. (ADI) is a leading semiconductor company that designs, manufactures, and markets integrated circuits (ICs), software, and subsystem products for customers worldwide. ADI distributes its products through direct sales, third-party distributors, independent representatives, and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Analog Devices (ADI), a mega-cap semiconductor company, has outperformed the S&P 500 year-to-date (48.5% vs 11%) and over the past 52 weeks (88.2% vs 28.6%).
• Q2 2026 results surpassed expectations with $3.62 billion in revenue and $3.09 adjusted EPS, driven by strong bookings in Industrial, Automotive, and Communications.
• The company provided an upbeat Q3 forecast of $3.9 billion revenue and $3.30 adjusted EPS, exceeding analyst estimates.
• ADI announced a $1.5 billion acquisition of Empower Semiconductor to bolster its AI-focused power management portfolio.
• Analysts maintain a 'Strong Buy' consensus rating with a mean price target of $445.72, indicating a 10.7% upside potential.
news.Keywords: semiconductor performance, Q2 results, forward guidance, AI demand, stock outperformance

news.Title: 券商晨訊台股投資建議摘要 (1) 2026年 6月 2日
news.Content:
【統一證券】

本週圍繞Computex展及科技大佬演說。台股目前維持良性輪動的高檔震盪格局，惟技術面高檔鈍化，加上外資期貨空單近6萬5千口，短線應提防行情隨時劇烈波動，操作保持適度的資金彈性，建議低接不追高。選股以流動性佳的中大型AI權值股為主，技術面轉強及有題材的個股為輔。長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、機箱滑軌、被動元件、功率半導體、航太衛星、特用化學及漲價概念等族群。

【國票證券】

美伊戰爭隨著時間拉長影響慢慢退去，加上Computex開展催化下，市場對科技族群投資情緒高漲，買盤推升大盤持續創下新高紀錄，趨勢偏多未變，不過短線乖離偏高，操作上宜待壓回短均附近再擇機介入。持續留意面板雙虎友達與群創，面板產業長期受中國產能過剩影響報價易跌難漲，但雙虎朝向先進封裝、低軌衛星等布局逐漸出現成效，營運有望走出困境重返榮耀，在當前的盤勢中可多留意布局時機。

news.Title: 台股噴發衝破4.5萬點　中經院院長示警：修正幅度恐比想像更大
news.Content:
在AI人工智慧熱潮下，台股多頭行情全面噴發，加權指數於1日開盤後一路強攻，盤中漲近1200點，最高來到45931點，再創歷史新高，終場收在45337.91點，同步改寫收盤紀錄。中華經濟研究院院長 連賢明 坦言漲勢超乎預期，雖然目前難以直接判斷股市是否已經過熱，但任何金融市場過熱後往往伴隨修正風險，「修正的幅度往往可能比大家想像得更大」。

2026年尚未過半，台股已頻頻刷新紀錄。根據統計，台灣股市5月總市值正式超越印度，成為全球第五大股市。本週2026台北國際電腦展COMPUTEX登場，加上台積電6月4日即將召開股東會，再度點燃市場對人工智慧供應鏈的期待。

對於近期股市表現，中經院院長連賢明1日坦言漲勢超乎預期。他表示，「如果有預期到股票市場會漲這麼快，我就先去買了」，並指出加權指數從突破3萬點後一路上攻至4萬5000點附近，漲幅明顯超出許多人預期。連賢明強調，雖然目前難以直接判斷股市是否已經過熱，但任何金融市場過熱後往往伴隨修正風險，「修正的幅度往往可能比大家想像得更大」。

經濟基本面方面，主計總處公布今年第一季經濟成長率高達14.55%，甚至高於去年第四季，5月底最新經濟預測更將全年經濟成長率上修至9.64%。連賢明表示，AI人工智慧的強勁需求可以支撐出口表現，景氣熱絡的情況可持續至年底。

中研院經濟所研究員簡錦漢分析，人工智慧硬體需求遠超市場原先想像，也讓各大機構持續上修台灣今年經濟成長預測。他指出，民間消費成長率預估達3.6%，屬於偏高水準，顯示內需動能同步升溫。

簡錦漢進一步指出，若以市值推算財富效果，自2023年1月至今，台股已累積創造約新台幣107兆元帳面財富。雖然這些仍屬「紙上富貴」，但民眾在感受到資產增值後，消費信心往往也會跟著提升，進一步帶動整體消費市場。

中經院公布的5月台灣採購經理人指數（PMI）為61.4%，較4月持續攀升，已連續8個月擴張，高於榮枯線50%，寫下近5年新高；非製造業經理人指數（NMI）則為58.2%，維持在高檔擴張區間。連賢明認為，從目前數據來看，台灣景氣確實處於相當熱絡的階段，人工智慧帶動的出口與投資動能仍是支撐經濟成長的主要力量，但投資人面對市場高檔時，仍應留意潛在波動與修正風險。

news.Title: 華邦電4月每股賺1.66元，達首季74%水準
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-02 08:40:44 新聞中心 發佈

華邦電(2344)因公司有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，故公布4月自結損益，4月營收192.45億元，年增182.23%；稅後淨利74.88億元，年增21608.78%，每股盈餘1.66元、達首季2.25元的74%水準。

華邦電董事長焦佑鈞於上週五股東會中表示，AI發展速度超出預期，記憶體市場進入結構性的缺貨，且目前缺貨已從DRAM擴大到NAND Flash以及NOR Flash，預計供不應求的情況將會延續到明(2027)年下半年都難以緩解。

營運方面，華邦電表示，第二季DRAM、NAND Flash及NOR Flash報價漲勢均優於原先預期，單季營收與獲利表現將較第一季提升，公司對下半年市場需求及營運表現維持樂觀看法。

華邦電：記憶體供不應求恐至明年H2也難緩解

台股焦點：品安(8088.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】Computex開展　台股圍繞AI熱潮續燒
news.Content:
日期：2026年 6月 2日

※盤勢分析

Computex開展，台股圍繞AI熱潮續燒

※昨日盤勢

computex展前夕，黃仁勳發表GTC Taipei 主題演講、眾多科技領袖參與高

峰對談，AI盛宴帶領台股開高走高，台積電早盤衝破2400元、加權指數走揚近4

萬6大關，隨後因台積電漲幅收斂，終場加權指數以上影線紅K再創新高。在AI需

求驅動下，記憶體與被動元件持續受投資人青睞。輝達正式宣告個人電腦進入全

新時代，AI Agent 將成為新一代 PC 的核心應用型態，激勵AI PC族群再度成為

盤面焦點；黃仁勳演說中表示AI能提高軟體工程師生產力，此說法點出資安的重

要性，軟體股同時因低基期優勢表現剽悍；另外，物理AI正推動機器人邁向下一

階段，相關概念股亦大放異彩。權值股方面，台積電收平盤，鴻海上漲1.56%，

聯發科上漲5.68%，廣達漲停上漲9.88%，台達電下跌1.02%。

盤面強勢股，廣達、華碩、聯茂、金居、台勝科、世芯-KY、訊芯-KY、長科

*、九豪、群創、山林水、新興等共117檔漲停；GIS-KY、鈦昇、有成精密、金山

電、大立光等漲幅9%以上；盤面弱勢股，睿生光電、德微及尚茂跌停；嘉晶、台

半、欣銓、東陽、敬鵬、印能科技等跌幅7%以上。終場台灣加權指數上漲604.97

點，以45337.91點作收，成交量1.48兆元。

觀察盤面變化，三大類股全面上漲，電子上漲1.21%、傳產上漲2.18%、金融

上漲1.88%。在次族群部份以塑膠、資服、光電表現較佳，分別上漲7.79%、

7.47%、5.29%。

※資金動向

三大法人合計買超380.67億元。其中外資買超368.17億元，投信買超77.59

億元，自營商賣超65.09億元。外資買超前五大為群創、台玻、台新新光金、南

亞科、國泰金；賣超前五大為力積電、友達、華南金、華新、長榮航。投信買超

前五大為台新新光金、華南金、長榮航、兆豐金、中信金；賣超前五大為聯電、

遠東新、國泰金、仁寶、富邦金。資券變化方面，融資增94.19億元，融資餘額

為5657.79億元，融券減0.69萬張，融券餘額為23.49萬張。外資台指期部位，空

單增加4023口，淨空單部位64673口，借券賣出金額451.03億元。類股成交比重

：電子88.32%、傳產8.80%、金融2.88%。

※今日盤勢分析

川普週一表示，美國與伊朗可望在未來一週內達成協議，延長目前停火安排

，並推動重新開放荷姆茲海峽。產業面：在輝達發表新一代 AI 個人電腦 (PC)

晶片、股價漲逾 6%，科技股領軍衝鋒，週一美股四大指數齊揚，台積電ADR上漲

4.11%。

台股後市分析如下：第一、輝達推出首款用於Windows作業系統的PC系統超

級晶片「RTX Spark」，當中的CPU由聯發科與輝達攜手打造，代號為「N1X」。

黃仁勳高喊，N1X是「世界上最令人驚嘆的晶片」，相關終端裝置預計秋天陸續

推出。同時提及，Token成為能帶來營收的獲利單位、AI是GDP產生器，代理式AI

時代來臨。接下來將是軟體公司發展的黃金盛世，前提是軟體必須以一種AI代理

人能夠使用的方式呈現，這將會是一項重大的突破。

第二、台達電總裁張訓海於輝達 NVIDIA GTCLive at Taipei 2026 會前直

播中指出，除了目前的 800V電源系統外，5 到 10年前投入研發的固態變壓器

(Solid-State Transformer, SST)，預計最慢明年迎來市場爆發，台達電也持續

將電源與散熱系統深度整合，發揮最大效益。

第三、技術面觀察，週一台股開高走高，成交量量縮收盤再創新高，技術指

標KD與RSI均持續向上延伸，MACD紅柱體擴大，目前資金充沛維持良性輪漲，盤

勢仍由多方掌握發球權。OTC指數同步走揚，後續應留意若產生資金排擠，中小

型股將依題材各自表現。

第四、盤面資金焦聚AI PC、資服、PCB材料、被動元件、記憶體等族群，包

括：廣達、安碁資訊、金居、國巨*、南亞科等表現強勢。

※投資策略

本週圍繞Computex展及科技大佬演說。台股目前維持良性輪動的高檔震盪格

局，惟技術面高檔鈍化，加上外資期貨空單近6萬5千口，短線應提防行情隨時劇

烈波動，操作保持適度的資金彈性，建議低接不追高。選股以流動性佳的中大型

AI權值股為主，技術面轉強及有題材的個股為輔。長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進

製程/封裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、機箱滑軌、被動元件、功率半導

體、航太衛星、特用化學及漲價概念等族群。

news.Title: Bank of America reiterates Amazon stock forecast at tipping point
news.Content: Amazon (AMZN) stock is up about 14.63% year to date, at the time of writing, Monday afternoon, June 1. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 Index (SPY) is up about 11.01% in the same period. And while Amazon has just slightly outpaced the S&P 500, it has also outpaced all but two Magnificent 7 members in the same period. Here is how the other Magnificent 7 members have performed: Alphabet (GOOGL) is up 19.95%. Nvidia (NVDA) is up 18.03%. Apple ...
news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: This News From Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Could Shift the Stock Into Overdrive
news.Content: Nvidia 's (NASDAQ: NVDA) GPU Technology Conference (GTC) Taipei kicked off this week. As a major regional edition of the company's flagship GTC event, it promised to provide a view into recent developments in artificial intelligence (AI) , gathering developers from around the world who will shape the future of AI. It is one of several annual events that showcase Nvidia's latest products, highlight important collaborations, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia unveiled the RTX Spark AI superchip for PCs, designed in collaboration with Microsoft, leveraging Grace CPU and Blackwell GPU for a native Windows experience with AI agents.
• The company also launched the Vera CPU, designed for agentic AI, which is up to 1.8 times faster than legacy x86 processors and is already in full production with major clients like Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX.
• The AI PC market is projected to grow from $58 billion in 2025 to $321 billion by 2035, with Nvidia's Vera CPU targeting a new $200 billion TAM.
• Nvidia reported record Q1 revenue of $81.6 billion, up 85% year-over-year, driven by data center revenue of $75 billion (up 92%), and is guiding for 95% Q2 revenue growth.
news.Keywords: AI Superchip, Agentic AI, Vera CPU, PC Market, Data Center Revenue

news.Title: Nvidia sends PC makers a message they can't ignore
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) believes the next battle will take place somewhere altogether different. At GTC Taipei, the firm unveiled RTX Spark , a new Windows platform designed for artificial intelligence agents. Rather than just helping users work faster, Nvidia envisions computers that can also reason through jobs, automate workflows, find files, and interact with software on behalf of users. This announcement is not just another hardware launch. It’s a warning to the wider PC business that the next upgrade cycle could be driven by ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia unveiled RTX Spark, a new Windows platform for AI agents designed to enable PCs to reason, automate workflows, and interact with software.

news.Title: Morgan Stanley resets Microsoft stock price target
news.Content: Big tech companies spend enormous sums of money all the time. They buy back stock, pay dividends , make acquisitions, and write checks that would make a defense contractor blush. Most of that spending is legible to investors. You can model it, forecast it, and plug it into a spreadsheet. But there is a specific kind of capital spending that breaks conventional financial modeling, and that is the kind where a company is building infrastructure for demand that doesn't exist yet. That is exactly what Microsoft ( MSFT ) is doing right now, and it's why a new research note ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley's analysis suggests Microsoft's significant capital expenditure on AI datacenter infrastructure is ahead of current revenue forecasts.
• The firm introduced 'revenue per megawatt' metric, indicating Microsoft's cloud ecosystem generates $20-30 million per MW, projected to decline slightly by FY28.
• Microsoft's installed datacenter capacity is expected to scale from 5 GW in FY24 to 20 GW by FY28, with a $190 billion projected capex for FY26, a 61% increase.
• Azure revenue grew 40% in F3Q26, exceeding expectations, while total revenue was up 18% year-over-year.
• The report highlights a potential gap between Microsoft's infrastructure build-out and Wall Street's revenue expectations, suggesting room for upward revisions.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, datacenter capacity, capital expenditure, revenue outlook, Azure growth
