news.Title: China toughens rules on outbound investment after Meta-Manus contention
news.Content: BEIJING, June 1 (Reuters) - China issued sweeping new ‌rules on Monday, ‌widening ...
news.AI_Summary:
• China has implemented new, sweeping regulations effective July 1, granting regulators broader powers to scrutinize overseas deals involving Chinese investors, technology, data, and national security.
• These rules were introduced a month after Beijing ordered the unwinding of Meta's acquisition of AI startup Manus.
• A key provision requires authorization for the export of restricted Chinese goods, technologies, services, or related data.
• The regulations aim to control outbound flows of technology and data, particularly in sensitive sectors like AI, and could impact cross-border technology and talent transfers.
news.Keywords: outbound investment, regulatory scrutiny, technology export, national security, data control

news.Title: 晶片股泡沫來了也不怕！巴隆點名5檔真贏家 美銀最愛也上榜
news.Content:
AI熱潮帶動全球半導體產業迎來新一波成長浪潮，晶片股也因此成為市場追逐焦點。然而，在股價大幅上漲的同時，市場對於泡沫化的疑慮也逐漸升高。《巴隆週刊》撰文指出，輝達、超微、博通、台積電與美光，正是最具代表性的五大贏家，具備長期競爭力。

其中，輝達無疑是AI時代最大的受益者，公司深耕AI運算近二十年，從GPU硬體到CUDA軟體平台建立完整生態系，形成難以撼動的競爭門檻，除了主導AI加速器市場外，也積極擴展資料中心網路與CPU業務，逐步挑戰傳統伺服器霸主地位。美銀也看好輝達，分析師普納瓦拉指出，強大的獲利能力與自由現金流支撐公司持續投入創新與策略投資，讓公司得以同步提升股東報酬，進一步鞏固市場領導地位。

超微則是在執行長蘇姿丰帶領下成功翻身，過去長期落後於英特爾與輝達，如今已在伺服器CPU市場取得重要地位，並逐步切入AI GPU領域，目前市占率已達40%，且資料中心業務快速成長，成為AI運算市場最重要的挑戰者之一。若以2027年獲利計算，目前本益比為40倍，雖高於其他優質晶片製造商，但絕對稱不上過高。

博通的成功模式有所不同，公司專注於客製化AI晶片設計，與Google、Meta等科技巨頭建立長期合作關係，Google TPU便是由博通協助開發的重要產品之一，隨著大型科技公司紛紛投入AI基礎建設，客製化晶片需求快速增加，為博通帶來龐大成長空間，其在網路晶片領域的領先地位，也讓公司成為AI資料中心不可或缺的供應商。執行長陳福陽更預告AI晶片銷售額將在2027年突破1000億美元大關。

台積電則是全球先進晶片製造的核心，無論是輝達、超微或博通，多數高階AI晶片都仰賴台積電生產，公司專注於最先進製程技術，並採取穩健擴產策略，長期維持高獲利能力。即使半導體產業景氣波動劇烈，過去十多年仍展現穩定成長實力，分析師預估明年的每股盈餘將再成長90%。不過，其大量產能集中於台灣，也使地緣政治風險成為投資人持續關注的議題。

至於美光，則受惠於AI帶動的高頻寬記憶體需求，過去記憶體產業高度循環，價格波動劇烈，但AI資料中心的快速擴張正改變市場結構，由於主要供應商在前一波景氣低迷期間縮減投資，如今供給明顯不足，推升價格與獲利能力。美光上季營收年增196%，毛利率攀升至74%，展現強勁獲利能力，市場預期本季表現將進一步提升；分析師預估，至2027會計年度（截至8月），公司調整後每股盈餘可望由前一年度的8.29美元躍升至100美元以上。

news.Title: AI需求暢旺　台積電全力擴產、拚矽光子今明年量產
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年06月1日電）台積電執行副總經理暨共同營運長米玉傑今天表示，AI需求太旺盛，台積電全力擴張產能。先進封裝是台積電最近幾年很熱門技術，是AI產業重要技術支撐，台積電在矽光子會有蠻好市場，預計今年、明年量產。

米玉傑今天參加輝達GTC Taipei主題演講前的暖場活動，他指出，技術領先、製造優勢及客戶信任是台積電的3個競爭利器，台積電創辦以來重視客戶的信任。

米玉傑說，在AI極端需求之下，最重要的是大力擴張產能，台積電在台灣、美國、日本、歐洲等地都在大力擴充產能，盡所有的力量生產。

他表示，台積電在擴產後，會透過自己的市場調查部門進行分析，分析客戶，或是客戶的客戶潛在需求。AI需求太旺盛，預期會有蠻好平衡。

至於每家客戶間如何達到平衡，米玉傑說，這需要很有智慧判斷，是董事長暨總裁魏哲家的智慧判斷，要與所有的客戶保持密切聯繫和合作，除全力支持重要客戶輝達，其他比較小的客戶也有適當調整，內部幾乎每週或每月都在討論，如何最合理或讓最多客戶得到滿足的方法。

至於台積電未來的技術發展，米玉傑表示，台積電對於技術非常重視，隨著摩爾定律一直演變，研發最重要工作是持續讓摩爾定律發展下去，台積電不斷推出7奈米、5奈米、3奈米、2奈米。

米玉傑說，台積電有個長處是與客戶保持密切合作，對於先進技術需求方向蠻了解，與輝達等世界設計廠商都非常密切，一直能夠掌握技術重點，也花很多資源看技術發展。

他表示，先進封裝是台積電最近幾年很熱門技術，是早在15年到17年前投入，是蠻有遠見方向，如今先進封裝發光發熱，成為AI產業重要技術支撐。

米玉傑說，台積電在矽光子技術會有蠻好市場，預計今年、明年量產。矽晶片堆疊技術，目前是邏輯在邏輯上堆疊，未來會進展至記憶體堆疊在邏輯技術上。

米玉傑表示，台積電與台達電有很多合作，了解系統上面散熱、供電是否還有不足之處，台積電也樂於跟其他廠商合作；台灣有全球最完整產業供應鏈，對於發展技術規劃未來藍圖有幫助。

news.Title: China expands curbs on foreign deals, tech transfer after Meta-Manus block
news.Content: By Laurie Chen BEIJING, June 1 (Reuters) - China issued sweeping new rules on Monday tightening control of overseas deals that involve Chinese investors, technology, data and national security, a month after Beijing ordered Meta to unwind its acquisition of AI startup Manus. The regulations, published by the State Council, or cabinet, seek to ‌influence deals in markets beyond mainland China, including Taiwan, and give Beijing the power to punish foreign firms whose home countries restrict Chinese investment. More ...
news.AI_Summary:
• China has implemented new regulations tightening control over overseas deals involving Chinese investors, technology, data, and national security.
• These rules, effective July 1, grant Beijing the power to force the unwinding of completed overseas transactions and punish foreign firms.
• The regulations are designed to prevent Chinese firms from divesting strategic assets and codify a retaliatory toolkit against U.S. entities involved in outbound investment screening.
• Cross-border talent transfers in sensitive sectors without approval are banned, targeting practices like 'Singapore-washing'.
• Beijing can also ban foreign entities from trading or investing in China and revoke visas if their home countries restrict Chinese investment.
news.Keywords: regulatory tightening, foreign investment, national security, cross-border deals, capital controls

news.Title: China tightens overseas investment rules after blocking Meta-Manus deal
news.Content: By Laurie Chen BEIJING, June 1 (Reuters) - China issued sweeping new rules on Monday tightening control of overseas deals that involve Chinese investors, technology, data and national security, a month after Beijing ordered Meta to ‌unwind its acquisition of AI startup Manus. The rules, published by the State ...
news.AI_Summary:
• China has enacted stringent new rules effective July 1, tightening control over overseas investments involving Chinese entities, technology, data, and national security.
• The new regulations follow Beijing's order for Meta to divest its acquisition of AI startup Manus, establishing a formal legal basis to force unwinding of completed overseas transactions.
• Key provisions include requiring authorization for exports of restricted Chinese goods, technologies, services, or data, and banning cross-border talent transfers in sensitive sectors without approval.
• These rules heighten compliance risks for global investors and could affect Chinese firms seeking to move capital and operations abroad, especially in sensitive sectors like AI.
news.Keywords: overseas investment, regulatory control, technology transfer, national security, compliance risk

news.Title: 台積電漲不動了？ 不敗教主改押2標的 借8位數進場賺百萬
news.Content: 台股在人工智慧（AI）熱潮帶動下持續改寫歷史新高，加權指數今年前5個月累計大漲逾1.5萬點，市場資金瘋狂湧入科技股。不過，有「不敗教主」之稱的 陳重銘 近日卻提出不同看法，直言權王台積電（TSMC）市值已突破60兆元，「拉抬難度越來越高」，現階段反而不是加碼台積電的最佳時機，並將資金轉向槓桿型ETF與主動式ETF布局。 陳重銘26日在《不敗教主-陳重銘》 粉專 上表示，近期包括聯發科、台達電以及台光電等個股漲勢都比台積電更為強勁，主要原因在於台積電市值規模已相當龐大，要再推升股價所需資金驚人。他認為，雖然長線仍看好台股發展，但短線震盪難免，因此選擇增加大盤正2與主動式ETF配置。 其中，他特別看好00663L。面對市場質疑正2產品在盤整期間會產生磨耗損失，不適合長期持有的說法，陳重銘認為，盤整反而提供投資人高出低進的操作空間，只要在大跌時適時加碼，便有機會抵銷磨耗成本，進一步提升整體報酬率。 陳重銘寫道：「誰說存股票就只能抱著不動？你要懂得隨機應變，善用大盤的波動，這些技巧書上不會寫，要自己學習跟體會。我也是花了幾年、砸下幾千萬來練習的。就算你不懂得高出低進，你只要敢在大跌時加碼加權正2，就可以抵銷盤整的磨耗。」 此外，他也透露自己趁大盤回檔時加碼00981A，並指出主動型ETF持有台積電比重相對較低，不容易被單一權值股綁架，適合作為資產配置工具。他更看好00403A未來建倉過程將有助推升00981A表現，形成市場俗稱的「抬轎效應」。 陳重銘進一步透露，自己5月中旬趁大盤修正時，甚至向銀行借入8位數資金進場布局，短短時間內已獲利達7位數。他預估，台股短期可能在4.1萬點至4.4萬點區間震盪，在高檔震盪環境下，操作正2與主動型ETF不僅能掌握大盤趨勢，也省去挑選個股的煩惱。 他說：「目前預估大盤在4.4萬~4.1萬間波動，我就操作正2跟主動型ETF，好處是不用挑選個股，我只要觀察趨勢就好。」

news.Title: 聯發科飆9％ 鴻海噴5％ 台達電漲3％！　COMPUTEX點火台股
news.Content:
【緯來新聞網】在美伊達成初步停火共識激勵下，台股迎來強勁反彈，指數一度大漲逾800點，成功站上4萬5大關。鴻海（2317）表現亮眼，股價一度攀升5.36％，最高達304.5元，成為推升市場的重要動力之一。同期，台積電（2330）股價也持續走高，最高達2365元，聯發科（2454）漲幅更逼近9％。

在美伊達成初步停火共識激勵下，台股迎來強勁反彈，指數一度大漲逾800點，成功站上4萬5大關。（圖／Artlist）

此次漲勢凸顯電子權值股集體發力，台達電（2308）同樣上漲超過3％，顯示科技股在 COMPUTEX 即將登場前受到資金青睞。整體來看，市場情緒因國際局勢穩定而明顯回溫，帶動主要電子股同步反彈，推動台股向歷史高點邁進。

news.Title: 台股站上4萬！他見空軍接連「畢業」疑是否過熱　網兩派：AI大時代下確實不高
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者王保伶／綜合報導

台股站上4萬點關卡後，市場對於後市走向的看法逐漸分歧。一名網友發文表示，近來觀察到不少看空的投資人「畢業」，甚至有朋友因放空虧損超過百萬元。他原本也認為4萬點是「天上掉下來的禮物」，沒想到指數仍持續向上推進，讓他好奇為何不少人認為4萬點已屬於高檔。貼文曝光後，引起網友熱議。

原PO在 PTT股板 發文透露，近期看不少空軍「畢業」，其中有朋友虧損逾百萬元。他指出，今年以來台股漲幅約52.41%，韓股上漲96.68%，費城半導體指數上漲78.95%，日經指數則上漲27.97%。他分析，若將台灣放在AI供應鏈核心的位置來看，加上國際市場表現，台股目前的漲幅並不算過度誇張，因此好奇為何仍有不少人認為4萬點已屬高檔。

貼文曝光後，部分網友指出，「高不高」其實與過往經驗有關，因為多數人從未見過如此高的指數位置，「因為今年五月以前都沒見過這麼高的指數」、「因為從來沒漲成這樣，都覺得高了」、「就人單純看到未知的事物後容易感到害怕」、「因為以前不到萬點才是常態啊」、「老人沒看過4萬點」。

有人則認為，在AI浪潮、企業獲利持續上修，以及台灣在全球供應鏈的關鍵地位支撐下，台股仍有成長空間，「今年獲利一直上修」、「在AI大時代的背景下確實不高」、「台積電 2029 看 4000+ 台股6萬長線不是基本嗎」、「不知道在怕什麼，明年這時候看早就不知道噴到哪了」。也有人認為，「現在趨勢就在多，一直幻想要空在最高點太不切實際了，因為目前沒人知道最高點在哪裡」、「海嘯怎麼時候來不知道，不如持續參與股市無腦多輕鬆」。

不過也有網友提醒，即便目前市場趨勢看多，仍不可忽視短線過熱風險，「看到四處的文章都這麼樂觀，先調整一下自己的倉位 」、「記得趴踢結束前，離出口近一點」、「當股市一片樂觀時，就可以開始空了，然後就畢業了」。

◎《FTNN新聞網》提醒您：本資料僅供參考，投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。

news.Title: 南亞科受惠DRAM漲勢大漲7％創新高！　台股突破4.5萬點紀錄
news.Content:
【緯來新聞網】台股今（1）日強勢突破4萬5千點大關，指數飆升753點達45533點，創下歷史新高。記憶體族群表現亮眼，其中南亞科股價大漲7.06％，達371元，同步刷新高點。華邦電與力積電也分別上漲7.59％及逾6％，帶動整體記憶體板塊持續走強。

記憶體族群表現亮眼，其中南亞科股價大漲7.06％，達371元，同步刷新高點。華邦電與力積電也分別上漲7.59％及逾6％，帶動整體記憶體板塊持續走強。（圖／翻攝自Google map）

此次漲勢主要受惠於DRAM價格走高，市場需求穩健，激勵相關個股同步上揚。其他權值股如臺積電、鴻海及聯發科也分別有不同程度的漲幅，展現半導體與科技產業整體向上動能。此外，被動元件類股同樣維持強勢，國巨等多檔個股刷新波段高點，顯示電子供應鏈景氣持續改善。

整體而言，隨著黃仁勳主辦的「兆元宴」激勵市場信心，加上記憶體價格回升，相關電子股及權值股紛紛創新高，呈現多頭格局，後市仍備受市場期待。

news.Title: 台積電3奈米製程報價，擬下半年最高調漲15%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-01 10:24:44 數位內容中心 發佈

台灣積體電路製造股份有限公司（2330）因應人工智慧晶片客戶的龐大需求，市場傳出其3奈米製程報價將於2026年下半年最高調漲15%。此舉反映出先進製程在市場中的優勢，主要受惠於全球科技巨頭加速導入3奈米技術。

在財務表現方面，台積電2026年第一季毛利率達到66.2%，淨利率則攀升至50.5%。台積電財務長黃仁昭曾公開表示，3奈米製程毛利率，預計在2026年下半年越過公司平均水位。

此外，受惠於半導體市場的強勁拉貨動能，該公司2026年員工分紅預計年增超過30%。為優化資源配置並專注核心業務，台積電於5月中旬宣布計畫出售子公司世界先進積體電路股份有限公司（5347）普通股，不超過1億5,200萬股，相當於已發行股本8.1%。 出售完成後，台積電持股比例將降至約19%，並強調，此舉不會影響雙方在矽中介層等技術的策略合作。

news.Title: Samsung, LG shares rally ahead of Nvidia CEO meetings with Korean executives
news.Content: SEOUL, June 1 (Reuters) - Shares in Samsung Electronics, LG Electronics and other South Korean tech firms rallied on ‌Monday, as expected meetings between Nvidia CEO Jensen ‌Huang ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Shares of Samsung Electronics and LG Electronics rallied significantly ahead of anticipated meetings between Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and Korean executives.
• Samsung Electronics shares surged 9.5%, reaching a market value over 2,000 trillion won ($1.32 trillion), while LG Electronics jumped 28%.
• The meetings are expected to foster potential collaborations in AI and robotics, boosting hopes for tie-ups.

news.Title: 黃仁勳神秘晶片將揭曉！聯發科衝4,710元嗨漲逾9% 分析師看法出爐
news.Content:
COMPUTEX點火！IC設計龍頭聯發科（2454）今（1）日早盤一度來到4,710元，創下歷史新高價，勁揚逾9%；截至上午9時50分，暫報4,570元，上漲6%。資深證券分析師蔡明翰受訪指出，市場看好聯發科第四季業績表現，加上與Google合作TPU、攜手輝達布局AI PC晶片等題材持續發酵，帶動資金積極進場，不過短線須留意本益比偏高的追價風險。

蔡明翰表示，聯發科股價成長動能主要來自於，看好第四季業績上修的預期，以及多項重大合作案，包括與 Google 合作研發 TPU，以及與輝達合作開發AI PC專用晶片，這些合作預計將為明年的業績帶來顯著貢獻；此外，英特爾在封裝合作關係上的深化，也有正向激勵作用。

但蔡明翰提醒，聯發科雖然長線發展動能強勁，但短線仍需留意追高風險，尤其目前的本益比相對偏高，且短期內的實際業績動能尚未完全發揮。他建議，已持有者可持續抱股，但對於空手者而言，應避免在現階段盲目追高，操作上應多參考技術面，若出現轉弱跡象則需警惕追高風險。

COMPUTEX將於明（2）日登場，聯發科技副董事長暨執行長蔡力行今日在「NVIDIA GTC Live 主題演講會前直播節目」以「從 PC 邁向嵌入式 AI 的演進之路（Journey From PCs to Embedded AI）」為題，分享聯發科技如何與 NVIDIA 深度合作，從物聯網 IoT、運算平台、車用電子到資料中心，雙方攜手推動全方位創新，共同驅動下一波產業變革。

市場過去傳出，輝達正與聯發科合作開發Arm架構Windows PC晶片，代號可能為N1或N1X，定位鎖定新一代筆電晶片，而非傳統顯示卡或AI加速卡。今年COMPUTEX 2026登場，外界盛傳，輝達執行長黃仁勳最快將於今日上午「GTC Taipei at COMPUTEX」主題演講中，正式公開傳聞已久的Arm架構筆電處理器（SoC）N1／N1X；而該晶片據悉由輝達與聯發科攜手打造。

資深分析師陸行之分析，N1／N1X是輝達攜手聯發科打造的Client PC旗艦級SoC，也是輝達重返Windows消費型PC市場的重要戰略產品。其中，N1X定位高階旗艦，鎖定AI PC、輕薄電競筆電與掌機市場；N1則主攻主流高效能與長續航筆電。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 〈台股開盤〉類股百花齊放 噴漲逾800點 彈跳躍過4萬5續創新高
news.Content: 台北國際電腦展本周登場，台股今 (1) 日在聯發科帶頭，電子代工、被動元件族群點火下，持續上攻，早盤漲逾 800 點，最高來到 45587.9 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台北國際電腦展即將登場，帶動台股今日開盤大漲逾800點，續創新高。
• 聯發科受惠於與輝達合作的新PC晶片傳聞，股價開盤即漲逾9%，創下新高價4710元。
• 電子代工族群表現強勁，鴻海、廣達、緯創、仁寶等紛紛上漲，其中廣達、緯創、仁寶亮燈漲停。
• 被動元件族群也受資金青睞，國巨漲停至800元，華新科漲逾9%。
• 非電子類股方面，塑化、航運、百貨貿易類股亦有顯著漲幅，台塑四寶中的南亞亮燈漲停。
news.Keywords: 科技展,AI晶片,電子代工,被動元件,指數創新高

news.Title: 台積股東會本周四登場 報價調整等議題料成焦點
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-01 09:40:58 新聞中心 發佈

晶圓 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 晶圓代工龍頭台積電將於本周四召開股東常會，預計將聚焦AI景氣、先進製程報價調整等議題。
• 市場預期台積電3奈米製程報價下半年最高可能調漲15%。
• 股東會將討論包括營運展望、先進製程報價、擴廠進度、季配息、技術布局、員工分紅等重要議案。
• 其中，修訂公司章程將董事人數由7-10人改為9-12人，是較受關注的議案之一。
• 欣銓預計第二季營收創高，下半年優於上半年。
news.Keywords: 股東會,AI趨勢,先進製程,報價調整,營運展望

news.Title: Will Nvidia Stock Rise During June 1 to June 4 From CEO Jensen Huang's Participation in COMPUTEX 2026?
news.Content: COMPUTEX 2026 is set to run from Tuesday, June 2, to Friday, June 5, local time at the Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center in Taipei, Taiwan. (The dates generally correspond to June 1 to June 4 in the United States, with Eastern time lagging Taipei time by 12 hours.) COMPUTEX ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang is scheduled to deliver a keynote at GTC Taipei on June 1, preceding the COMPUTEX 2026 trade show.
• COMPUTEX is a major global technology trade show where industry giants unveil new products in AI, computing, and robotics.
• Nvidia previously accelerated its GPU architecture release cadence to annually and announced the adoption of its Spectrum-X Ethernet networking platform at COMPUTEX 2024.
• Other major tech companies including Intel, Microsoft, and Qualcomm are also participating in COMPUTEX 2026.
news.Keywords: AI, GPU, networking platform, trade show, keynote

news.Title: 00981A單日30億元大換倉 瑤姐為何重押鴻海與廣達？
news.Content: [Newtalk新聞] 大盤上週五(29日)創下歷史新高、收在44732點，漲逾1096點，成交量刷新天量紀錄的同時，多數人的目光都放在指數與漲停股身上。但對資金面來說，真正 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 主動ETF 00981A單日換倉30億元，其中21億元大舉買入鴻海，並新建倉廣達。
• 此資金流向顯示市場資金正從半導體後段測試轉向伺服器組裝端，與AI供應鏈的佈局有關。
• 鴻海股價創下近18年新高，廣達作為NVIDIA重要合作夥伴，其伺服器代工業務受到關注。
• MSCI權重調整生效及COMPUTEX展前效應，是推動資金流向的兩大關鍵催化劑。
• 緯穎也獲得加碼約5.1億元，顯示AI相關供應鏈持續受到資金青睞。
news.Keywords: ETF資金流向,AI供應鏈,伺服器代工,權重調整,COMPUTEX

news.Title: 台股早盤達45533.53點漲800點　再創新高
news.Content: （中央社記者潘智義台北1日電） 台北國際 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠於台北國際電腦展即將登場，台股今日早盤大漲800點，指數達到45533.53點，再創歷史新高。
• 台積電早盤上漲10元至2365元，顯示半導體產業的強勁表現。

news.Title: 台股5月開戶人數新增13.2萬人　累計達1433萬人創高
news.Content:
（中央社記者曾仁凱台北2026年06月1日電）台股5月持續飆高，投資人湧入股市，根據台灣證券交易所統計，5月台股累積總開戶數達到1433萬2896人，續創新高，比4月再增加13萬2102人。

進一步觀察投資人開戶數的年齡層分布，5月新增開戶數中，20至30歲新增開戶4萬102人，增加最多；其次是19歲以下新增2萬8358人。合計30歲以下新增開戶數達6萬8460人，占5月整體新增開戶數51.8%，顯示台股持續朝向年輕化趨勢發展。

根據證交所5月投資人開戶數年齡分布統計表，19歲以下累積開戶數為75萬2643人，月增2萬8358人；20至30歲累積開戶數180萬8798人，月增4萬102人；31至40歲累積開戶數232萬8535人，月增2萬4830人；41至50歲累積開戶數267萬9070人，月增2萬791人；51至60歲累積開戶數238萬4092人，月增1萬871人；61歲以上累積開戶數426萬6823人，月增5620人；法人等其他累積開戶數11萬2935人，月增1530人。

news.Title: Micron’s trillion-dollar rally points to a bigger AI problem
news.Content: Micron Technology ( MU ) is having the kind of rally that can shift the perception of an entire industry on Wall Street . The memory-chip maker briefly topped the $1 trillion market value threshold for the first time on May 26, on the back of soaring demand for chips that power artificial intelligence data centers. But the rally did not stop there. Shares of Micron are lately trading at $928.41 for a market value of over $1.06 trillion, Bloomberg Television confirmed. That's a big change for a firm often seen as one of the more cyclical brands in semiconductors ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology briefly surpassed a $1 trillion market value due to soaring demand for AI data center chips, with shares trading above $1.06 trillion.
• Analysts, including UBS, have significantly boosted Micron's price target, with one analyst raising it to $1,625, citing a structural change in the memory market driven by AI.
• Micron has sold out its high-bandwidth memory (HBM) supply for 2026 and is developing next-generation HBM4 devices, positioning it centrally in the AI infrastructure supply chain.
• The company's investment in US manufacturing, including advanced DRAM production in Virginia, adds a political tailwind, with praise from President Trump for domestic chip production.
news.Keywords: AI memory, HBM, market capitalization, semiconductor cycle, domestic manufacturing

news.Title: 1分鐘讀財經》台積電股東會倒數 5大焦點一次看！外資驚喊目標價3字頭
news.Content:
小編今天（1）日精選5件不可不知的國內外財經大事。市場聚焦的台積電股東會4日將登場，是台股本周除COMPUTEX外的另一大盛事。外資看台積電3字頭戰隊成軍，日前由瑞銀證券調升股價預期至3,000元，加入里昂證券與調研機構ALETHEIA陣營；同時，根據外資所做財務模型，台積電今年每股稅後純益（EPS）將來到百元附近。

【1】股東會前 台積3字頭戰隊集結

瑞銀證券近期將台積電目標價調升至3,000元，與ALETHEIA齊平、均僅次於里昂證券的3,030元。台積電最新出席瑞銀亞洲投資論壇（AIC）時認為，未來數年雲端AI將持續帶來強勁成長趨勢，為了縮小供給缺口，台積電除持續擴大資本支出，也透過多項措施提升產能利用與生產效率。

【2】15檔上櫃中小尖兵 外資青睞

受惠AI、半導體、高速傳輸及機器人等題材輪番點火，櫃買指數29日再寫波段新高，資金湧入具成長性的中小型股，其中信驊（5274）成5月外資最青睞股，搭配29日再買超27.42億元，合計5月來外資大買信驊104.04億元。

【3】外銀：黃金目標價上看5,900美元

避險資金重回黃金市場，外銀指出，金價短期上方壓力落在每盎司4,800美元。展望後市，看好央行增持黃金以及降低對美國資產依賴等兩因素，渣打銀行預估，未來12個月金價有望上看5,500美元；星展銀行認為，今年第四季可望上揚至5,300美元，並於明年第二季進一步攀升至5,900美元。

【4】房市熱度降溫…信用管制鬆綁？ 央行：韓國更嚴

中央銀行自2020年底以來，已推出七波房市選擇性信用管制，近期信用管制措施開始見效，房市熱度明顯降溫，目前市況呈現「量縮價盤整」階段，對於市場期待持續鬆綁管制，央行近期發布專欄提到，韓國近年也推出多波信用管制，並強調韓國管制其實比我國更為嚴厲。

【5】連16個月單月未達2.5萬棟…4月全台買賣移轉棟數續下滑

房市交易量持續低迷，據內政部最新統計，4月全台建物買賣移轉棟數約2萬棟、年減6.8％，累計前四月約8.05萬棟，年減4.9％，自2025年1月迄今已連續16個月單月買賣移轉棟數未達2.5萬棟，這波房市交易慘淡，持續期間寫史上最長。

news.Title: What to Know About Snowflake's Partnership With Amazon
news.Content: Snowflake (NYSE: SNOW) is expanding its partnership with Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) , specifically Amazon Web Services (AWS), in a collaboration aimed at accelerating AI capabilities among enterprise customers. The news of the multiyear ...

• The multiyear agreement involves Snowflake committing to spend $6 billion on AWS over five years, increasing its use of Amazon's Graviton CPUs and Trainium GPUs.
• Snowflake reported a solid Q1 2026 with 33% year-over-year revenue growth and over $9 billion in remaining performance obligations.
• This strategic investment aims to drive growth by helping customers leverage AI for reasoning and workflows, despite potential risks related to AI adoption costs and business results.

做多氛圍依然濃厚，短線台股仍可偏多看待。

news.Title: US moves to block Nvidia AI chip sales to Chinese firms outside China
news.Content: Investing.com-- The U.S. Department of Commerce on Sunday moved to block Nvidia artificial intelligence chip sales to Chinese entities outside China– a loophole that may have ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The U.S. Department of Commerce is moving to block Nvidia (NVDA) and AMD (AMD) AI chip sales to Chinese entities outside of China.
• This action aims to close a loophole that may have been used to bypass existing U.S. restrictions on chip sales to China.
• Advanced AI chips from these companies may have been supplied to subsidiaries of Chinese firms based abroad, despite broader U.S. sanctions.
• The move impacts the ability of Chinese firms to acquire advanced AI processors for their operations, potentially affecting their AI development.
news.Keywords: Export Controls, AI Chips, Geopolitics, Semiconductor Sanctions, Supply Chain

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】本周COMPUTEX開展　台股持續挑戰新高
news.Content:
日期：2026年 6月 1日

※盤勢分析

本周COMPUTEX開展，DELL股價飆漲，台股持續挑戰新高

※昨日盤勢

受惠Dell公布的營運展望遠超市場預期，及Anthropic最新一輪融資後估值

衝上9650億美元，一舉超越OpenAI，加上黃仁勳在兆元宴釋出「AI市場規模將比

過去大上百倍」。台股大盤在眾AI利多刺激下，大盤以43815點開高後一路走高

，終場大漲1096點，成交量（不含盤後）更爆出1.81兆元的歷史級天量。權值股

方面，台積電上漲2.61%，鴻海上漲9.88%，聯發科下跌2.26%，廣達上漲9.88%，

台達電上漲2.30%。

盤面強勢股，鴻海、廣達、緯創、華碩、宏碁、東陽、彩晶、緯穎、台勝科

、群創、力積電、宏碁、金居、昇達科等漲停；技嘉、仁寶、富世達、巧新、光

洋科、南亞、友達等漲幅8%以上；盤面弱勢股，萬潤、尚茂跌停；艾姆勒、邁科

、順德、醣聯、研勤、弘塑、應廣、利機、元太等跌幅5%以上。終場台灣加權指

數上漲 1096.5 點，以44732.94點作收，成交量1.81兆元。

觀察盤面變化，三大類股全面上漲，電子上漲2.62%、傳產上漲2.53%、金融

上漲1.19%。在次族群部份以塑膠、電腦及週邊設備、電器電纜表現較佳，分別

上漲7.23%、6.70%、5.64%。

※資金動向

三大法人合計買超1027.71億元。其中外資買超801.45億元，投信買超70.18

億元，自營商買超156.07億元。外資買超前五大為群創、鴻海、仁寶、友達、南

亞；賣超前五大為台新新光金、華南金、聯電、長榮航、台半。投信買超前五大

為聯電、華邦電、國巨*、台積電、技嘉；賣超前五大為仁寶、國泰金、南亞科

、台新新光金、華南金。資券變化方面，融資增213.34億元，融資餘額為5563.6

億元，融券減0.63萬張，融券餘額為24.18萬張。外資台指期部位，空單增加

3511口，淨空單部位60650口，借券賣出金額527.94億元。類股成交比重：電子

87.57%、傳產8.64%、金融3.79%。

※今日盤勢分析

受到COMPUTEX本周二即將揭幕，以及輝達執行長黃仁勳主題演講的預期心理

帶動，加上主計總處日前大幅上修今年台灣GDP成長率預測值至9.64%，彰顯AI出

口動能的實質強勁。且從美股Dell日前公布的財報來看，其AI伺服器收入與訂單

爆發性成長，顯示全球AI資本支出正加速向底層基礎設施與實體硬體擴展。此一

趨勢直接外溢至台股供應鏈，整體預估台股震盪盤堅，續創新高。

台股後市分析如下：第一、根據TrendForce最新記憶體產業研究，AI發展從

大型模型訓練轉向以推理為核心的Agentic AI應用，驅動記憶體需求結構性擴張

，供給缺口短期無法補足，推升價格上漲。TrendForce大幅上調全球記憶體產值

預估，將2026年產值從前一版的5,516億美元提高至8,893億美元，2027年則預計

由8,427億美元上修至逾1.28兆美元，年增率約44%。

第二、主計總處 29 日公布台灣今年最新經濟成長率 (GDP) 預測值衝上

9.64%，較 2 月一口氣上修 1.93個百分點，創16年來新高，反映 AI 出口超乎

預期好，全年每人 GDP 4 萬 5610美元，而消費者物價指數 (CPI) 年增率1.93%

，仍低於通膨警戒線 2%。

第三、技術面觀察，周五大盤收今日台股收一根大紅K棒，並穩健站於所有

均線之上。技術指標KD、RSI維持向上走勢，MACD紅柱體亦同步擴大，多頭結構

相對健康。

第四、盤面資金焦聚AI伺服器、PCB材料、矽晶圓等族群，包括：鴻海、緯

創、廣達、金居、台燿、環球晶等表現強勢。

※投資策略

DELL、Oracle與IBM股價飆漲，加上本周COMPUTEX開展，期間科技巨頭包括

輝達、高通、英特爾及Marvell等接力演講，預期將釋放更多產業合作細節，且

下周有SpaceX掛牌，題材熱度有望帶動台股續創新高，惟外資期貨空單創新高逾

六萬口，且季線正乖離率居高不下，短線須提防行情劇烈波動。操作上可保持適

度的資金彈性，建議分批布局AI權值股。長線追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封

裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、機箱滑軌、被動元件、功率半導體、航

太衛星、特用化學及漲價概念等族群。

news.Title: 華邦電：記憶體供不應求恐至明年H2也難緩解
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-06-01 08:29:08 新聞中心 發佈

華邦電(2344)於上週五(5/29)召開股東會，董事長焦佑鈞表示，AI發展速度超出預期，記憶體市場進入結構性的缺貨，且目前缺貨已從DRAM擴大到NAND Flash以及NOR Flash，預計供不應求的情況將會延續到明(2027)年下半年都難以緩解。

焦佑鈞認為，AI將會逐步發展到2050年，且發展速度超出預期，使記憶體產業進入結構性缺貨，雖然各家廠商已積極擴產，但產能開出需要時間，預期供不應求的情況會持續至2027年下半年都可能難緩解；而華邦電除了提升高雄12吋廠產能利用率外，同時也已規劃設計高雄第二座廠，預計2027年開始建廠、2029年才能量產。

華邦電總經理陳沛銘也表示，在AI時代中，記憶體已成為戰略物資，第二季記憶體價格優於第一季，下半年價格也有望維持在高檔水準，而就目前各大廠擴產速度來看，記憶體供不應求情況可能將延續到2028年。

台股焦點：福懋科(8131.TW)

台股焦點：品安(8088.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【國票金控晨訊】台灣加權指數高檔震盪　可留意記憶體族群
news.Content:
日期：2026年 6月 1日

※操作建議與結論

DELL財報優於預期，美股全數收漲

台灣加權指數高檔震盪，可留意記憶體族群

今日盤勢及未來走勢：(留意記憶體布局機會)

雖美伊協議尚未出爐，市場趨於觀望，然在DELL財報優於預期，股價大漲逾

30%帶動下，美四大指數全數收漲，幅度介於平盤至 0.72%，其中費半指數收於

平盤，台積電ADR下跌1.51%，台指期夜盤下跌246點，預估今日台股開於盤下，

盤中科技權值股或有買盤湧入，挹注指數重回盤上震盪。

※短線觀點

台股在連續三個交易日開高走低整理後，上週五再度放量上攻，以逾1.8兆

元成交量收出長紅K，宣告多頭行情仍未結束，其中ODM/OEM族群全面轉強，其中

2317鴻海、2382廣達、3231緯創、6669緯穎全數漲停，顯見資金仍在不同主流族

群中快速流轉，做多氛圍依然濃厚，短線台股仍可偏多看待。

※操作看法

近期隨美光產能移轉美國、SK海力士將部分DDR4產能轉向DDR5，使DDR4供給

進一步收縮，加上企業級SSD與資料中心需求同步升溫，供需缺口有望擴大至

2027年。目前記憶體族群仍處於全球記憶體景氣復甦初期階段，後續若股價因短

線漲多出現拉回，仍可視為中長期布局機會。

※重點產業與族群

記憶體–2344華邦電、2408南亞科

產業觀點：原先市場預期下半年DDR4供需將逐步平衡，但受惠於美光設備移

轉美國及海力士持續縮減DDR4產能，供給減少幅度優於預期，預估DDR4第三季價

格仍有約20%漲幅空間。

news.Title: 財報公布前夕獲奧本海默樂觀前瞻，博通上週五大漲4.7%，市值逼近台積電
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】在全球網通與客製化AI晶片巨頭--博通(Broadcom，美股代碼AVGO)在6月3日公布最新財報之際，知名券商奧本海默(Oppenheimer)發布極為樂觀的前瞻報告，預計這家網通晶片巨頭將交出超越市場預期並調高未來業績指引的成績單，其中AI業務依然是核心的成長動能。受到這項利多報告提振，博通5月29日收盤大漲20.19美元或4.73%至446.77美元創新高，開春以來漲幅擴大到29.09%，市值來到2兆1153億美元，全球科企排名第七，與排名第六台積電(2330)的2兆1703億美元只差550億美元。奧本海默在報告中預測，博通的AI相關收入季增率將達到約30%，這主要得益於公司與Alphabet旗下的谷歌以及OpenAI等科技巨頭進行的深度客製化晶片合作，目前博通手握的在手訂單積壓金額已高達約730億美元。該機構同時估計博通的毛利率將維持在78%的高水準，因而重申對其「買入」的投資評級。

儘管整體展望樂觀，但報告中也提及博通目前潛在的雙重風險。首先，OpenAI原定與博通簽署的一筆高達180億美元的晶片交易案，近期因OpenAI面臨部分融資障礙而增添變數；其次，博通內部高層人士近期出現淨賣出超過1.3億美元公司股票的操作，這項內部人套現動作也引發市場局部的審慎情緒。

分析師指出，隨著全球數據中心與AI伺服器對高速傳輸與客製化ASIC晶片的需求持續爆發，博通在網通領域的壟斷地位仍將為其提供強大的財報支撐。即將公布的正式財報與管理階層對下半年的展望，將成為驗證奧本海默樂觀預期是否兌現，以及能否引領半導體類股再度衝高的關鍵風向球。

news.Title: 台股高檔攻略3／AI修正不是結束　操盤女將揭「西施東施股」最大差別
news.Content:
當市場還沉浸在AI大行情中，台股績優操盤手卻已開始留意另一項風險：供應鏈短板效應。從CoWoS先進封裝、HBM高頻寬記憶體，到電力與散熱，AI產業鏈目前正面臨關鍵零組件不足問題。只是在危機背後，也可能隱藏下一波投資機會。

長年操盤績效亮眼的野村優質基金經理人陳茹婷認為，下半年台股修正未必是行情結束，反而可能是重新布局AI長線主流的重要時點。

她坦言，現在其實很像1990年代網際網路革命後期。資金、夢想與估值同步膨脹，短線震盪在所難免，但真正的大方向其實還沒有結束。「投資人現在該關心的，不是高點在哪，而是如何安全下莊、活著等到下一個大循環。」

陳茹婷指出，下半年市場最需要留意的風險，來自AI供應鏈的「短板效應」。目前包括CoWoS先進封裝、HBM高頻寬記憶體、電力與散熱等，都是限制AI出貨的重要瓶頸。甚至美國雲端服務商，已出現「零組件堆滿倉庫，但缺關鍵零件無法組成整機」的狀況。

也因此，她認為台股接下來可能因供應鏈瓶頸，出現一波中期修正。不過，這種修正未必是壞事；「這等於是提供新的布局機會，因為從明年開始，隨著CoWoS與HBM產能逐漸開出後，AI需求仍會持續擴張，只是短板會逐步往更上游移動，包括2奈米、3奈米等先進製程，未來都可能成為新的稀缺資源。」

她點名，包括先進封裝、ABF載板、CCL、PCB、水冷散熱、高壓直流電（HVDC）、光通訊等，仍會是AI長線主軸。

進一步從台股對應受惠族群來看，高速傳輸與材料升級部分，包括PCB、CCL與光通訊等方向，代表公司包括欣興、南電、台光電、聯茂、華通與光環。至於散熱與伺服器升級方面，則聚焦散熱模組與水冷解決方案，包括奇鋐、雙鴻與建準等。

在選股邏輯上，陳茹婷提出「西施與東施理論」。她認為，真正值得長抱的企業，必須同時具備市場領導地位，及競爭對手3到5年都難以追趕的技術門檻。相反地，有些公司很會講夢、講故事，但實際上產業競爭力未必足夠，說穿了只是「東施效顰」；真正強大的企業，其實相對低調。

她提醒投資人，下半年市場波動可能加劇，但真正重要的，不是短線漲跌，而是手中持有的公司，到底是具備長期競爭力的「西施」，還是只靠題材炒作的「東施」。

配件：AI產業與投資主軸對應個股 (請抓紙本)

news.Title: 台股高檔攻略2／油價、升息、槓桿3殺　台股下半年修正時機曝光
news.Content:
AI熱潮帶動台股一路創高，但在市場情緒極度樂觀背後，風險也正在累積。績優操盤手提醒，目前台股不僅與年線乖離過大，市場槓桿操作更明顯升溫，一旦出現回檔，恐引發連鎖性賣壓。面對下半年可能出現的高檔震盪，投資人現在最重要的不再只是拚報酬率，而是如何做好資金控管、降低風險，在修正來臨時保有進場銀彈。

今年來操作績效逾8成，在人氣爆棚的主動式ETF中排名前段班的00994A（主動第一金台股優）經理人張正中認為，台股漲多就是最大利空，進入下半年，投資人必須嚴控資金，逢高調節。「4月以來指數一路上攻，短時間內累積大量漲幅，與年線乖離過大，過去經驗顯示，當乖離率超過30%時，市場多會拉回修正，而這次乖離率超過45%，技術面已過熱。」他強調。

再看資金面，「現在很多人將持股，如0050（元大台灣50）或台積電質押再去買股；當市場出現回檔，這些槓桿資金恐被迫出場，形成連鎖性賣壓，造成多殺多局面，接下來必須採取相對保守的資金策略，降低槓桿操作。」他提醒。

張正中建議，當台股壓力劇增，投資人可逐步拉高現金部位，而持股減碼優先順序，應先調節已漲多或高估值的科技股，其次是高評價的中小型股，至於權值股支撐較強，在市場回檔時相對抗跌，可當作壓艙石。「像台積電這種股票，通常都是最後才跌。」

而台股基金長青樹、野村優質基金經理人陳茹婷，近6個月操作績效達110%；她觀察後市，認為下半年較值得注意的風險，是AI供應鏈的「短板效應」。

「目前包括CoWoS先進封裝、HBM高頻寬記憶體、電力、散熱等，都是限制AI出貨的重要瓶頸。美國雲端服務商已出現『零組件堆滿倉庫，但缺關鍵零件組不成整機』的情況。接下來，台股可能因供應鏈瓶頸，出現一波中期修正。」

陳茹婷指出，這種修正反而提供新的布局機會，投資人應好好把握。「因為明年開始，CoWoS、HBM等產能陸續開出後，AI需求仍會繼續擴張，只是短板將轉移到更上游的2奈米、3奈米先進製程。」她強調，包括先進封裝、ABF載板、CCL、PCB、水冷散熱、高壓直流電（HVDC）、光通訊等，仍是長線主軸。

總的來看，台股4萬點之上仍可布局，但必須掌握進出節奏。玉山科技島基金經理人王偉哲指出，AI產業基本面是穩的，下半年較大風險來自總體經濟；尤其地緣政治變數，恐影響油價走勢，刺激通膨攀升，進而牽動美國聯準會利率政策。一旦市場開始討論升息，對股市衝擊就會相當劇烈。

最穩健的做法是採取3原則：1、將資金拆成2到3筆，等待回檔布局，不要追高也不要一次投入；2、提高現金比重，回檔時才有銀彈可加碼；3、優先布局權值股。「因為權值股波動較低，且在資本支出轉弱時較具抗跌性；尤其，當先進製程成為最稀缺資源時，市場競爭邏輯也會完全改變。」王偉哲建議。

配件：AI產業與投資主軸對應個股 (請抓紙本)

news.Title: JPMorgan doubles down on stock market message for 2026
news.Content: The S&P 500 is near record highs. Micron just became a $1 trillion company in 48 trading days. Credit spreads are historically tight. Jamie Dimon has seen this before. The JPMorgan Chase CEO has spent the better part of 2026 watching markets climb through the same risks he has been flagging for months. At the Reagan National Economic Forum on May 29, he chose his words carefully. He did not call it a bubble. He did not tell investors to sell. What he said was more nuanced than either of those things, and more important. His message deserves to be ...
news.AI_Summary:
• JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon expressed concerns about market exuberance, noting that while it can persist, it also presents risks if asset prices decline.
• Micron Technology's surge to a $1 trillion valuation in 48 trading days was highlighted as an example of potential market hype.
• Dimon identified inflation (potentially hitting 4%), tight credit spreads, and geopolitical risks as key concerns that could impact asset prices.
• Despite caution, JPMorgan anticipates a 10% rise in investment banking fees for Q2 due to increased dealmaking and corporate confidence.
news.Keywords: market exuberance, risk assessment, inflation concerns, geopolitical risk, investment banking

news.Title: Nvidia and AMD face new export limits on China subsidiaries
news.Content: Investing.com -- The U.S. Department of Commerce on Sunday issued guidance closing a potential loophole that may have allowed companies to export advanced chips including Nvidia's Rubin and Blackwell ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The U.S. Department of Commerce has issued new guidance to close a loophole that allowed advanced AI chips from Nvidia and AMD to be exported to Chinese entities outside of China.
• This guidance enforces license requirements for advanced chips destined for entities headquartered in China, even if they are located elsewhere, like Malaysia.
• The loophole, created in May 2025, may have allowed hundreds of thousands of advanced AI chips to be exported over the past year.
• Nvidia has received licenses for its H200 chips but has not secured approval from Chinese officials, and no deliveries have been made so far.
news.Keywords: export controls, AI chips, China, semiconductors, regulatory guidance

news.Title: Nvidia’s $150 billion bet trumps AMD
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) is making a significant worldwide push as the artificial intelligence competition continues to accelerate across the computer industry. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said on May 27 that the business aims to invest as much as $150 billion a year in Taiwan , highlighting the island’s growing significance to the chipmaker’s long-term AI strategy . The news came during a launch party in Taipei for Nvidia’s proposed Taiwan headquarters, which Huang said is expected to begin construction this year and be operational by 2030. The investment indicates a considerable leap from the levels at which Nvidia has ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia plans to invest up to $150 billion annually in Taiwan to bolster its AI strategy, a significant increase from previous spending levels.
• This investment aims to secure Nvidia's supply chain, leveraging Taiwan's semiconductor ecosystem, including key partners like TSMC and Foxconn.
• Nvidia reported Q1 fiscal 2027 revenue of $81.6 billion, an 85% increase year-over-year, with Data Center revenue up 92% to $75.2 billion.
• The company forecasts Q2 revenue of $91 billion, excluding any Data Center revenue from China, highlighting the importance of its Taiwan manufacturing partnerships.
news.Keywords: AI strategy, supply chain, Taiwan investment, semiconductor manufacturing, data center revenue

news.Title: US takes step to halt Nvidia AI chip shipments to Chinese firms outside China
news.Content: By Karen Freifeld May 31 (Reuters) - The U.S. Department of Commerce on Sunday moved to close a year-old potential loophole it had created that may ‌have led companies to export the world's most advanced chips - like Nvidia ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The U.S. Department of Commerce has implemented new guidance to close a loophole that allowed advanced AI chips (Nvidia's Rubin/Blackwell, AMD's MI350x) to be exported to Chinese entities outside China.
• This guidance enforces license requirements for advanced chips destined for Chinese-headquartered entities, even if located in countries like Malaysia.
• It's estimated that hundreds of thousands of advanced AI chips may have been exported through this loophole over the past year.
• The loophole was created when the Commerce Department decided not to enforce the AI Diffusion rule issued in the final days of the Biden administration.
news.Keywords: export restrictions, AI semiconductors, China, regulatory loophole, Commerce Department

news.Title: Amazon joins Microsoft in sending shocking message to employees

news.Title: Better AI Inference Stock to Own: Nvidia or Cerebras?

news.Keywords: dividend stocks, value investing, ETF, risk-return profile, diversification

news.Title: This AI Hardware Bottleneck Is Determining the Next Trillion-Dollar Tech Companies
news.Content: In its infancy, high-performance processors largely made by Nvidia were the key to modern-day artificial intelligence's (AI) success. The solution to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The current AI hardware bottleneck is the lack of capacity for managing and storing data, creating opportunities in memory and storage solutions.
• Micron Technology's net income more than tripled year-over-year on 74% revenue growth, with its stock price soaring over 237% in 2026.
• SK Hynix and Samsung are also benefiting from the demand for memory chips and hard drives, with their stock prices significantly increasing.
• DRAM prices are expected to continue rising, with Gartner forecasting a 125% growth in 2026 and data storage prices soaring 234%.
news.Keywords: AI hardware, data storage, memory chips, DRAM, supply chain

news.Title: The $10 Trillion Robotaxi Boom Is Real. This 1 Stock Is the Smartest Long-Term Buy.
news.Content: In 2010, four self-driving vehicles drove more than 8,000 miles from Italy to China. The vehicles had solar-powered laser scanners and a host of video cameras that analyzed the environment and made navigation decisions in real time. "We didn't know the route," one of the researchers involved explained. "I mean what the roads would have been and if we would have found nice roads, traffic, lots of traffic, medium traffic, temperamental drivers, or regular drivers, so we encountered the lot." At the time, many experts predicted that self-driving cars were just around the corner. Fifteen years ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The robotaxi market is projected to be a $8-10 trillion opportunity, with significant scaling expected by 2030.
• Tesla (TSLA) is identified as a leading company in the robotaxi space due to its integrated manufacturing capabilities and Cybercab production.
• Tesla has ongoing robotaxi pilot programs and plans for rapid expansion, though facing persistent safety and technical challenges.
• While growth potential is high, much of Tesla's $1.3 trillion market cap may already reflect the robotaxi opportunity.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous vehicles, EV, market opportunity, Tesla

news.Title: Exxon and Chevron Are Warning That Oil Prices Could Skyrocket in the Coming Weeks. Here's What That Could Mean for Investors.
news.Content: Oil prices have cooled off over the past couple of weeks due to optimism that the U.S. and Iran are close to a peace deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz. Brent oil, the global benchmark price, was recently around $90 a barrel, down from over $110 a barrel in mid-May. While Brent is still up more than 50% on the year, it had almost doubled at one point. The current respite ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Oil prices could skyrocket in the coming weeks as oil stockpiles continue to drain, according to warnings from ExxonMobil and Chevron executives.
• The Strait of Hormuz closure has caused a significant oil supply disruption, with global stockpiles being depleted at a record rate of 8.7 million barrels per day.
• U.S. commercial crude inventories and the Strategic Petroleum Reserve (SPR) are significantly below average and historical levels.
• If oil inventories reach all-time lows, Brent crude prices could surge to $150-$160 per barrel, potentially leading to a meaningful slowdown in the global economy.
news.Keywords: oil prices, commodity, supply chain disruption, geopolitical risk, inventory levels

news.Title: President Donald Trump's Social Security Double Whammy Can Expedite Its Insolvency

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: Why 2026 Is a Year of Foundational Growth for Tesla
news.Content: Everybody would like catalysts to appear sooner rather than later for their stocks, and that's definitely the case with Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) . Investors have waited for years for the robotaxi rollout, for the Optimus robot, for full self-driving (FSD) software revenue to take off, and for the Semi truck to begin production. The bad news is that none of these will move the needle financially for Tesla this year, but the good news is that they are set to lay the foundation for long-term growth in 2026. Here's ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's robotaxi, Optimus robot, FSD software, and Semi truck are expected to lay the foundation for long-term growth starting in 2026.
• These initiatives are forecast to contribute only 2% of total revenue in 2026 but are projected to account for 46% of overall company revenue growth between 2026 and 2028.
• The Semi truck and Cybercab production ramp-up will be slow initially, while FSD adoption is strong with subscription models and awaiting further approvals.
• Investors are advised to view these developments as foundational rather than immediate game-changers, with a significant step-up expected in 2027.
news.Keywords: long-term growth, product rollout, revenue forecast, autonomous driving, electric vehicles

news.Title: Nvidia Is the World's Largest Company. Is It the Most Important?
news.Content: Being the largest and being the most important company aren't necessarily the same thing. Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) is the largest company by a fairly wide margin -- at the time of this writing, it has about a $500 billion lead over second-place Alphabet -- but ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia is currently the largest company by market capitalization, with a significant lead over Alphabet.
• While Nvidia's GPUs are dominant in AI, competitors like AMD and custom chips such as Google and Broadcom's TPU pose challenges.
• Nvidia's importance extends to investment indexes, making up about 7.5% of the S&P 500, meaning its performance significantly impacts market indices.
• Nvidia's revenue grew 85% in its last quarter, highlighting its critical role in portfolio success and market performance.
news.Keywords: market leadership, AI, competition, S&P 500, revenue growth

news.AI_Summary:

news.Title: This Quantum Computing Stock Is the One the Smart Money Doesn't Want You to Find
news.Content: When most investors think about quantum computing, they picture labs in California or glossy slides at CES, or most recently, the Trump Administration's massive investment in the space. Quantum computing conversations tend to veer toward roadmaps, qubit counts, and charts that all end with "2030+." What they rarely picture is something far more concrete: governments already wiring quantum systems into their national security infrastructure. That is the version of quantum IonQ (NYSE: IONQ) is building. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• IonQ is securing significant government contracts for its quantum computing technology, particularly in national security and communication infrastructure.
• The company has deployed quantum key distribution (QKD) systems in Romania (RoNaQCI) and Slovakia, integrating them into national networks.
• These government contracts provide long-term revenue streams and create strong competitive moats.
• IonQ's acquisition of ID Quantique provides a channel to sovereign and telecom customers.
• The company's Tempo system achieved an algorithmic qubit score of AQ 64, indicating a threshold for solving real-world problems.
news.Keywords: quantum computing, national security, government contracts, QKD systems, trapped-ion systems

news.Title: Meta Platforms Investors Reject Proposals as Zuckerberg Bets Big on AI
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Meta Platforms, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. Meta shareholders overwhelmingly rejected all 10 outside investor proposals at the 2026 annual meeting, including measures on AI data oversight, executive pay, voting rights, human rights and climate commitments. CEO Mark Zuckerberg said Meta’s biggest growth opportunity is artificial intelligence , pointing to four areas: improving core apps and ads, personal AI agents, business agents and AI hardware. Meta is keeping capital focused on AI investment , with CFO Susan Li saying the company is not planning a stock split and has paused share repurchases while ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms shareholders rejected all 10 outside investor proposals at the 2026 annual meeting, including those related to AI data oversight, executive pay, and human rights.
• CEO Mark Zuckerberg identified artificial intelligence as Meta's largest growth opportunity, focusing on four key areas: core apps/ads, personal AI agents, business agents, and AI hardware.
• The company is prioritizing AI investments and has paused share repurchases, with no stock split planned.
• Director nominees received strong support (at least 82%), and Ernst & Young was ratified as the auditor.
• Meta's daily active users across its apps are growing, with video driving engagement and Threads on track to be a leading app in its category.
news.Keywords: AI investment, shareholder proposals, recurring revenue, user growth, capital allocation

news.Title: Move Over, Nvidia: 1 AI Stock Just Posted Its Best Day Since 2011 -- and Wall Street Says It's Still Cheap.
news.Content: Micron Technology shares jumped more than 19% on Tuesday, the memory-chip maker's biggest single-session gain since 2011, and the move pushed the company past $1 trillion in market value for the first time -- making it one of the 10 most valuable public companies in the U.S., as of this writing. The catalyst for the stock's big surge this week was a sharply higher price target from a major Wall Street firm. And this was followed by several ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology's stock surged over 19%, its best day since 2011, pushing its market value past $1 trillion.
• The rally was driven by significantly higher price targets from Wall Street analysts, with one tripling its target to $1,625.
• AI is reshaping the memory chip market, leading to long-term contracts and tight supply for high-bandwidth memory (HBM).
• Micron's fiscal Q2 revenue rose 196% year-over-year to $23.86 billion, with adjusted EPS soaring 682%.
• The company guided for Q3 revenue of $33.5 billion, representing 260% growth, and trades at an attractive forward P/E of 13x.
news.Keywords: memory chips, AI demand, HBM supply, revenue growth, forward P/E

news.Title: Investors look beyond chipmakers for next wave of AI winners in Asia
news.Content: Investing.com -- Investors are increasingly turning to Asian technology suppliers and infrastructure companies as potential beneficiaries of the next phase of artificial intelligence spending, Bloomberg reported on Sunday. The shift comes as major AI companies, including SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic, ...
news.AI_Summary:

• Concerns over stretched valuations of leading semiconductor stocks are driving interest in electronic components, advanced packaging, cooling systems, and server-related products.

news.Title: Microchip Technology Says Inventory Slump Is Nearing End as Data Center Wins Build
news.Content: AI Is Reviving an Overlooked Chip Category—and These 3 Names Are Riding the Demand Wave Microchip Technology (NASDAQ:MCHP) executives said the company is nearing the end of a prolonged inventory correction while positioning for growth tied to data centers, aerospace and defense, automotive systems and industrial markets. Speaking at TD Cowen’s 54th annual TMT conference, President and CEO Steve Sanghi described the post-COVID semiconductor cycle as “extremely unique,” saying artificial demand created a large gap between customer orders and actual consumption. He said Microchip was particularly affected because of an inflexible customer order program that limited cancellations and pushouts, prolonging ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microchip Technology expects its inventory correction to end soon, anticipating growth from data centers, aerospace, defense, automotive, and industrial markets.
• The company's shipments to customers and distributors have narrowed the gap with actual usage, indicating a normalization of purchasing patterns.
• Inventory days have fallen from a peak of 266 to 185, with a target range of 130-150 days.
• Microchip is cautious about opportunistic price increases, preferring to pass on genuine cost inflation from suppliers.
• Dedicated data center products, including storage controllers, memory controllers, and PCI Express products, are experiencing significant growth.
news.Keywords: inventory correction, data center growth, supply chain normalization, pricing strategy, product diversification

news.Title: Nvidia’s latest product is a game-changer
news.Content: Nvidia ( NVDA ) stock is up about 15.44% year to date, at the time of writing, Friday afternoon, May 29. Meanwhile, the SPDR S&P 500 index ( SPY ) is up about 11.06% in the same period. While the stock has outpaced the S&P 500, its growth is lagging that of other semiconductor companies that are part of the AI boom. Here are the gains other semiconductor companies achieved in the same period: Sandisk (SNDK) is up 608.5%. Micron ( MU ) is up 238%. Intel ( INTC ) is up 221.64%. Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD ) is ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's new Vera CPU, designed for agentic AI and reinforcement learning, is considered a game-changer, targeting a new $200 billion TAM.
• The Vera CPU features 88 custom 'Olympus' cores, offers twice the performance of the Grace CPU, and supports FP8 precision.
• Nvidia anticipates nearly $20 billion in CPU revenue this year and aims to capture market share from Intel and AMD.
• Despite strong earnings and a dividend increase, Nvidia's stock growth has lagged some peers like Micron (238%) and Intel (221.64%).
• The company has delivered its first Vera CPUs to major clients including Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceXAI.
news.Keywords: agentic AI, Vera CPU, new TAM, market share capture, performance improvement

news.Title: SpaceX Wants Even More Profits Ahead of Its IPO
news.Content: SpaceX has picked June 12 as its IPO date . Even before the initial public offering happens, however, SpaceX is laying the foundations for becoming the most profitable space company in history. As I reported in March, SpaceX raised the price on Falcon 9 launches for the fourth time, to $74 million, a 21% increase over the original price. That's a significant price hike, but despite what you might think, rocket launches have become a smaller and smaller part of SpaceX's business over time. SpaceX today is much more of a Starlink company ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX has set its IPO date for June 12 and is implementing price increases for its Starlink services to boost profitability.
• Starlink generated approximately 61% of SpaceX's $18.7 billion revenue in 2025 and is expected to grow.
• Residential Starlink prices are increasing by $5-$10 per month, with some tiers seeing double-digit percentage hikes.
• Conversely, SpaceX is reducing prices for some fixed-site 'local priority' business Starlink tiers.
• These pricing strategies aim to enhance profitability and accelerate growth among key customer segments ahead of the IPO.
news.Keywords: IPO preparation, Starlink pricing, revenue growth, profitability enhancement, customer segmentation

news.Title: 【台股大拆股時代2】只懂股票一拆四？遇到反分割「10股變1股」 專家曝風險
news.Content: 台股股票、ETF分割頻傳，不過你真的了解「拆股」的意義所在嗎？除了拆股以外，相反的一種作法則為反分割，大來國際投顧陳玠儒 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股股票、ETF分割頻傳，但「反分割」操作也引起關注，專家說明其風險。
• 反分割是一種集中籌碼的方式，可能提高價格、降低投機籌碼，但若個股、ETF慘跌後進行反分割，可能引發股價太低避免下市、改善價格觀感等負面聯想。
• 股票分割的好處是增加流動性，但分割未必會漲，需視基本面優劣。
• 反分割可能被市場聯想到避免下市、吸引法人投資人等，但可能導致曲高和寡，行情不好時無人接盤。
news.Keywords: 股票分割,反分割,籌碼集中,流動性,市場聯想

news.Title: 【台股大拆股時代1】國巨分割翻5倍...「拆股就起飛」？這些「前千金股」不漲反跌 昔生技股王竟剩100元
news.Content: 隨著被動元件大廠國巨（2327）股價在近日奔上784元新天價，股價自一拆四之後不斷衝高，以最高價計算，相較拆股參考價已經翻5倍有餘，連連創高期間也將創辦人陳 ...

• 去年分割的0050一年內股價翻了超過2倍。

• 拆股並非萬靈丹，仍有許多個案分割後表現不如預期，甚至下跌。
news.Keywords: 股票分割,分割後表現,千金股,流動性,基本面

news.Title: Every Big Tech Company Is Solving AI the Same Way. This Stock Is Solving It Differently.
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) playbook is familiar by now: Build a bigger GPU cluster. Add more Blackwell chips. Throw more electricity at the problem. If the chips get hot, build the data center next to a river. If the bandwidth runs out, lay more copper. That is how Amazon , Alphabet , Microsoft , and Meta Platforms are solving AI in 2026. And it works -- until it runs into physics. Will ...
news.AI_Summary:
• GlobalFoundries (GFS) is developing a different approach to AI infrastructure by focusing on co-packaged optics (CPO) to overcome the limitations of copper wiring.
• GFS's SCALE platform utilizes silicon photonics to enable faster, cooler, and more power-efficient data transmission, addressing a key bottleneck in AI.
• The company has strengthened its position through the acquisition of Advanced Micro Foundry and has demonstrated significant technological advancements.
• Despite a recent stock drop, the long-term outlook for GFS is positive, driven by its innovative solutions for hyperscale data centers and AI.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, co-packaged optics, silicon photonics, manufacturing, data center

news.Title: Jeff Bezos' Blue Origin rocket explodes as space tech stocks tank
news.Content: New Glenn's fourth flight was meant to carry Amazon's Project Kuiper satellites into orbit. Instead, it exploded on the launchpad at Cape Canaveral on the evening of May 28 during a hotfire test. By the time markets opened the following morning, the damage had spread well beyond Blue Origin's hangar. What happened at Cape Canaveral and what Blue Origin said Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket exploded during a hotfire test at Launch Complex 36 in Cape Canaveral on May 28. No satellites were on board and all personnel were safe. The company described the incident as an "anomaly" and said ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Blue Origin's New Glenn rocket experienced an explosion during a hotfire test on May 28, with no personnel or satellites on board.
• This is the second major setback for New Glenn in less than two months, raising reliability concerns.
• The incident caused a broad selloff in space tech stocks, with AST SpaceMobile falling 14.79% and Rocket Lab down over 6%.
• Amazon's Project Kuiper satellite deployments and AST SpaceMobile's launch agreements with Blue Origin are now delayed.
• Jeff Bezos acknowledged the setback, stating 'we'll rebuild whatever needs rebuilding and get back to flying.'
news.Keywords: rocket explosion, space tech stocks, Blue Origin, New Glenn, supply chain disruption

news.Title: Is It Smart to Claim Social Security Early When the Stock Market Is Volatile? Here Are the Pros and Cons.

news.Title: AI Hyperscalers Are Taking on Debt, But the Broader Market Looks More Leveraged

news.Title: Irrational Exuberance 2.0 Has Arrived on Wall Street

news.Title: Blue Origin faces months of delays after rocket explosion damages launch pad

The mishap, ‌which occurred during a test fire of the engines for the New Glenn rocket's launch next week, comes at a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Blue Origin faces a significant setback of at least six months due to a rocket explosion damaging its launch pad.
• The incident occurred during a test fire of the New Glenn rocket, impacting schedules for Amazon's satellite launches.
• This delay jeopardizes Amazon's LEO constellation deployment timeline, which requires deploying half its satellites by July 2026 to meet regulatory deadlines.
• The explosion also affects Blue Origin's planned launch of its Blue Moon lunar lander and potential NASA lunar missions.
• The setback strengthens SpaceX's position in the commercial launch market, although SpaceX also experienced a similar launch pad incident in 2016.
news.Keywords: Launch vehicle, satellite deployment, regulatory deadline, commercial launch market, supply chain disruption

news.Title: This Is SpaceX's Biggest Market, and It Might Surprise You (Spoiler Alert: It Has Nothing to Do With Space)
news.Content: SpaceX is expected to go public in June in what will be the biggest initial public offering (IPO) ever on the stock market. The company is looking to raise about $75 billion, according to recent reports, and debut on the stock market with a valuation of nearly $2 trillion. That would put it in the top-10 most valuable companies if it were public today, and it would be even more valuable than Elon Musk's other company , Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) , which is worth $1.6 trillion today. The investing community is psyched for the IPO and for the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX is preparing for a potentially record-breaking IPO, aiming to raise $75 billion at a valuation of nearly $2 trillion, surpassing Tesla's current market cap.
• While known for space travel, SpaceX's business also includes Starlink (connectivity) and xAI (artificial intelligence), with Starlink being its only profitable segment.
• SpaceX generated $4.1 billion in revenue last year with a $657 million operating loss for its space segment, but sees a $370 billion TAM.
• The Starlink business generated $11.4 billion in revenue and $4.4 billion in operating income, with a $1.6 trillion TAM.
• The AI business, including consumer and enterprise applications via xAI, saw $3.2 billion in revenue and a $6.4 billion operating loss, with a massive $26.5 trillion TAM, indicating significant investment and potential.
news.Keywords: SpaceX IPO, Starlink, artificial intelligence, market capitalization, TAM

news.Title: Trumpflation Isn't Close to Peaking -- and That's Terrible News for a Stock Market That's Priced for Perfection
news.Content: The stock market delivering outsize returns under President Donald Trump is nothing new. During his first, non-consecutive term, the ageless Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , benchmark S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and growth stock-propelled Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) gained 57%, 70%, and 142%, respectively. Since Trump's second term began, the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite have surged another 16%, 25%, and 34%, respectively. On an annualized basis, Dow/S&P 500 returns under Trump have outpaced most other presidents since the late 1890s. Missed Nvidia in 2009? This Rare Signal Is Flashing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article argues that 'Trumpflation,' driven by tariffs and the Iran war impacting oil prices, is not peaking and poses a significant risk to a stock market priced for perfection.
• Inflation has surged from 2.4% to 3.8% year-over-year between February and April, with projections indicating a further rise to 4.18% in May, a three-year high.
• Tariffs on imported goods like steel increase domestic production costs, which are passed on to consumers, contributing to sticky price increases.
• The closure of the Strait of Hormuz due to the Iran war has significantly impacted fuel prices, acting as a primary driver of current inflation.
• The author suggests that the stock market's outperformance, fueled by AI and tax cuts, is unsustainable given the current inflationary pressures and geopolitical risks.
news.Keywords: Trumpflation, inflation, tariffs, oil prices, market valuation

news.Title: Stock Split Watch: Is Eli Lilly Next?
news.Content: Eli Lilly (NYSE: LLY) may not immediately come to mind when you think of growth stocks. Instead, you might think of technology or even consumer-oriented players. But Lilly actually has shown itself to be a top growth player in recent quarters, and this is thanks to its strength in one particular market: the obesity drug market. Lilly has slipped ahead of rival Novo Nordisk to control the GLP-1 drug market in the U.S., now holding about ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Eli Lilly (LLY) is a strong growth stock, particularly in the obesity drug market, holding about 60% share in the U.S. GLP-1 drug market.
• The stock has advanced over 160% in the past three years and recently surpassed $1,000, prompting speculation about a potential stock split.
• Stock splits can lower the per-share price, making the stock accessible to a wider range of investors and signaling management optimism.
• Lilly has a history of stock splits, but the last one was in the late 1990s; a current split might depend on sustained trading above $1,000.
• The launch of its oral obesity drug, Foundayo, alongside injectables like Mounjaro and Zepbound, represents a significant new growth driver for the company.
news.Keywords: Stock split, obesity drugs, GLP-1 market, growth stock, revenue growth

news.Title: Forget SaaS: Why AI Agents Could Make ServiceNow and Palantir Technologies the Next Trillion-Dollar Platforms
news.Content: Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Continue » The fear about how agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is making software-as-a-service (SaaS) companies obsolete is real. Many SaaS stocks have tanked over the past ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Agentic AI could redefine the software landscape, potentially making traditional SaaS models obsolete, impacting companies like ServiceNow and Palantir Technologies.
• Despite a 33% and 23% stock decline this year respectively, ServiceNow and Palantir may benefit from agentic AI by providing platforms to manage these autonomous systems.
• ServiceNow's Control Tower and Palantir's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) are designed to unify AI programs and disparate datasets, respectively, creating long-term opportunities.
• These companies have long-standing client relationships and deeply embedded systems, providing a competitive advantage against pure agentic AI solutions.
• However, high valuations (61x and 154x TTM earnings for ServiceNow and Palantir) may limit immediate upside despite strong growth runways.
news.Keywords: Agentic AI, SaaS, ServiceNow, Palantir Technologies, valuation

news.Title: Could Agentic AI Be Apple's Next Big Tailwind?
news.Content: Artificial intelligence (AI) helped many tech leaders improve their businesses. news.AI_Summary:

• Apple's strategy of refining existing technologies, exemplified by AirPods and the iPhone, suggests it could successfully capitalize on the agentic AI shift.
• The company's large installed base of over two billion devices provides a significant advantage for rapid customer reach and leveraging network effects for AI features.
• Apple's recent quarterly report showed its best top-line growth rate in over three years, partly driven by AI-powered features in the iPhone 17.
• Despite being near all-time highs, Apple's potential in agentic AI, coupled with its established ecosystem and user base, presents a compelling case for investors.

news.Title: Wall Street Has a Consensus on This AI Stock. The Consensus Is Dead Wrong.

news.Title: 5-star analyst sets jaw-dropping SanDisk stock price target

news.Title: 台股瘋漲國內消費沒跟上？學者揭台股財富效果失靈真相
news.Content: 台股多頭氣勢如虹，2026年還沒過半，台股已經接連飛躍3萬點、4萬點大關，不論是咖啡廳、菜市場，都可聽到民眾談論股市行情，投資台股儼然成為全民運動。然而，股市大漲未能等比例反映在國內消費，學 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股屢創新高，但國內消費成長力道相對溫和，學者分析財富效果帶動實體經濟的效果有限。
• 原因一為股市賺到的資金續留股市尋找更好標的，或用於房屋增貸、小額貸款等槓桿操作。
• 原因二為部分資金流向海外旅遊，導致國內服務業對景氣熱絡感受有限。
• 儘管主計總處上修民間消費實質成長率至3.6%，但國人在國外消費成長率更高。
• 學者擔憂，若股市漲勢無法轉化為實體經濟動能，且年輕人過度投入股市可能降低就業意願。
news.Keywords: 財富效果,國內消費,股市資金流向,海外旅遊,實體經濟

news.Title: Are Summer Headwinds Already Pricing Into Stocks?
news.Content: The average price-to-earnings ratio for the S&P 500 index (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) over time is around 19x. Today, the S&P 500's P/E ratio is around 27.5x. Here's what you need to know as you make investment decisions at the start of June. There is a material "wall of worry" An old Wall ...

• Chevron CEO Mike Wirth indicates oil prices are more likely to rise due to reduced supply and impact on global oil reserves.

news.Title: Meta, TikTok, Snap, and YouTube settle school lawsuit for $27M
news.Content: Investing.com -- Meta Platforms, TikTok parent ByteDance, Snap, and Alphabet’s YouTube have agreed to pay roughly $27 million to settle claims brought by a Kentucky school district alleging their platforms contributed to a student mental health crisis, Reuters reported on Friday. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms, TikTok, Snap, and YouTube have agreed to a $27 million settlement in a lawsuit filed by a Kentucky school district.
• Meta will pay the largest portion of the settlement at $9 million, with TikTok and Snap paying $8 million each, and YouTube paying $2.01 million.
• The lawsuit alleged that the platforms contributed to a student mental health crisis by designing features to keep young users engaged.
• The settlements do not require any admission of wrongdoing or changes to platform features.
• This case was seen as a bellwether for over 1,200 similar lawsuits filed by school districts across the US.
news.Keywords: litigation, settlement, mental health, social media, youth engagement

news.AI_Summary:
• Gavin Baker, CIO of Atreides Management, believes the AI sector is 'cross-sectionally inefficient' regarding valuations.
• He notes that memory stocks (e.g., Micron) and Nvidia are trading at low P/E ratios, while power, cooling, and optical stocks (e.g., Lumentum, Coherent) have much higher multiples.
• Baker suggests that if the high multiples for optical stocks are justified, then memory and Nvidia stocks should increase significantly.
• Conversely, if Nvidia and Micron's multiples are correct, the higher-multiple stocks may underperform.
• The analysis favors cheaper AI-related stocks like Micron and Nvidia over those relying on multiple expansion for growth.
news.Keywords: AI sector, valuation, P/E ratio, semiconductor, investment strategy

news.Title: GlobalFoundries Maps Path to 40% Margins as Silicon Photonics Demand Builds
news.Content: Quantum Computing's Commercial Breakout Has Arrived GlobalFoundries (NASDAQ:GFS) Chief Financial Officer Sam Franklin said the chipmaker sees a path to significantly higher profitability over the next several years, driven by a mix shift toward faster-growing end markets, technology services, manufacturing productivity and better utilization of its existing footprint. Speaking at a TD Cowen event hosted by analyst Krish Sankar, Franklin said GlobalFoundries is targeting an exit gross margin of about 30% in 2026, 40% by the end of 2028 and 45% over the longer term. He said the company’s margin plan is tied to investments already made, customer design-win momentum ...
news.AI_Summary:
• GlobalFoundries (GFS) aims to significantly increase profitability, targeting a 40% gross margin by the end of 2028 and 45% long-term.
• Margin improvements are expected from a mix shift towards faster-growing end markets (communications, data center, automotive, IoT), technology services, and manufacturing efficiency.
• The company is increasing capital spending to $1.3-$1.4 billion this year, reflecting strong demand visibility and investments in areas like silicon photonics.
• GlobalFoundries targets a $1 billion silicon photonics run rate by the end of 2028 and $2 billion long-term, driven by pluggable optical transceivers and co-packaged optics.
• Technology services revenue is expected to grow to 12%-14% of total revenue long-term.
news.Keywords: gross margin, silicon photonics, capital expenditure, technology services, semiconductor

news.Title: Social media companies pay $27 million to settle Kentucky school district’s lawsuit over social media harms, records show
news.Content: By Diana Novak Jones May 29 (Reuters) - A Kentucky school district secured approximately $27 million in settlements from social media companies over claims they fueled a student mental‑health crisis, with Meta Platforms paying the largest amount at $9 million, according to records seen by ‌Reuters on Friday that reveal the settlement's financial terms for the first time. More from Yahoo Scout Why are ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms, Alphabet (Google), Snap, and ByteDance have settled a lawsuit with a Kentucky school district for approximately $27 million, related to social media's impact on student mental health.
• Meta paid $9 million, Alphabet $2.01 million, Snap $8 million, and ByteDance $8 million.
• The school district accused the companies of designing addictive platforms that fueled anxiety, depression, and self-harm among students.

news.Title: The 180-Day Lease Holding Up SpaceX's $2 Trillion IPO
news.Content: Buried on page 13 of SpaceX's S-1 prospectus is the line item that has done more to justify a reported $2 trillion valuation than any other single disclosure in the filing. Anthropic, the rival AI company that Elon Musk publicly called "evil" earlier this year, is paying SpaceX $1.25 billion every month for compute capacity inside the Colossus 1 and Colossus 2 data centers in Memphis. The filing describes the payments running through May 2029. Annualized, that amounts to $15 billion a year. Spread across the full term, the deal totals roughly $45 billion. More News from Barchart ARM Stock ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's potential $2 trillion IPO valuation is significantly influenced by a disclosed $1.25 billion monthly lease payment from Anthropic for compute capacity.
• This deal, initially appearing as a multi-year contract totaling ~$45 billion, was clarified by Elon Musk as a 180-day lease with a 90-day cancellation notice, significantly reducing its long-term value.
• SpaceX's AI segment revenue of $3.2 billion in 2025 (with $818 million in Q1 2026) is heavily reliant on this short-term Anthropic agreement, masking substantial losses in the segment.
• The clarification shifts the narrative from secured long-term revenue to a short-term rental, impacting investor perception of the AI infrastructure pivot and overall valuation.
news.Keywords: IPO valuation, compute capacity, lease agreement, AI infrastructure, revenue clarification

news.Keywords: gross margin pressure, custom AI silicon, competitive landscape, revenue growth, semiconductor industry

news.Title: Meet the Newest Member of the Stock Market's Exclusive $1 Trillion Club (Hint: It's an AI Semiconductor Powerhouse)
news.Content: On Tuesday, May 26, Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) surpassed $1 trillion in market capitalization for the very first time, capping off an explosive 830% gain in its stock over the last 12 months. It's officially the third American semiconductor company to join the exclusive trillion-dollar club, behind Nvidia and Broadcom . Micron is one of the world's top suppliers of high-bandwidth memory (HBM) for the data center, a critical component in the artificial intelligence (AI) hardware stack. The company has incredible pricing power right now because demand for memory is heavily outstripping supply, which is fueling ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology surpassed $1 trillion in market capitalization, achieving an 830% stock gain in the past 12 months.
• The company is a top supplier of High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM) for AI data centers, benefiting from strong demand and pricing power.
• Micron's HBM3E and upcoming HBM4 solutions offer significant performance and energy efficiency advantages, with Nvidia selecting them for upcoming GPUs.
• Fiscal 2026 second-quarter revenue surged 196% year-over-year to $23.8 billion, with cloud memory up 163% and mobile/client up 245%.
• Earnings per share exploded 756% to $12.07 in the second quarter, indicating rapid profit growth driven by the memory shortage.
news.Keywords: market cap, HBM, AI hardware, revenue growth, pricing power

news.Title: Sandisk's QLC Stargate Gains Traction: A New Revenue Growth Catalyst?
news.Content: Sandisk Corporation ’s SNDK QLC Stargate platform is emerging as a powerful new revenue catalyst, with the company expecting revenue-generating shipments to begin in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026. The launch strengthens Sandisk’s position in the rapidly expanding AI-driven data-center storage market and creates an additional growth avenue beyond its already successful ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Sandisk's QLC Stargate platform is expected to drive revenue growth starting Q4 fiscal 2026, targeting the AI-driven data-center storage market.
• Data-center revenues increased 233% sequentially to $1.47 billion in Q3 fiscal 2026.
• Stargate addresses the demand for high-capacity, cost-efficient flash storage for AI workloads and complements existing TLC offerings.
• Micron Technology and Western Digital are also expanding their AI storage roadmaps, competing with Sandisk.
• Sandisk's shares have significantly outperformed the broader market, and its fiscal 2026 revenue is projected to grow 153.17% year-over-year.

news.Title: AMZN Deepens Its AI-Powered Shopping Push: Where Is the Stock Headed?
news.Content: Amazon AMZN is deepening its bid to dominate conversational commerce. On May 13, 2026, it folded its Rufus shopping assistant and the Alexa+ assistant into a single agentic tool, Alexa for Shopping, now free to U.S. customers across the Amazon app, website, and Echo Show with no Prime membership or device required. The system carries a shopper's history ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon is integrating its Rufus and Alexa assistants into a single AI tool, 'Alexa for Shopping,' to enhance conversational commerce.
• The AI shopping assistant drove nearly $12 billion in incremental sales in 2025, with over 300 million customers using Rufus.
• AWS is offering its Agentic Shopping Assistant architecture to external retailers, with Tapestry's Kate Spade as an early adopter.
• Advertising revenues rose 24% to $17.2 billion in Q1, and net sales climbed 17% to $181.5 billion.
• Trailing-12-month free cash flow fell to $1.2 billion due to increased AI-related equipment purchases, and Q2 guidance implies margin pressure.
news.Keywords: conversational commerce, AI shopping assistant, AWS, advertising revenue, free cash flow

news.Title: Meta Platforms Could Open Up a Massive New Revenue Stream
news.Content: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ:META) is typically considered one of the four big hyperscalers in the tech sector. These are companies that own and operate massive cloud computing and data storage businesses, and in the AI era, they’re all spending massive amounts on data centers and AI infrastructure. The other three major hyperscalers are Amazon ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms is considering launching its own cloud computing services, a move that could open a significant new revenue stream beyond advertising.
• The company plans over $100 billion in capital expenditures this year for data centers and AI infrastructure.
• Launching a cloud business would diversify Meta's revenue base, which is currently heavily reliant on advertising.
• Competitors like Amazon, Microsoft, and Alphabet are experiencing accelerating revenue growth and high margins in their cloud divisions.
• Meta's stock trades at a P/E ratio of 23, with 33% revenue growth reported in Q1, suggesting potential for stock appreciation with a cloud offering.
news.Keywords: cloud computing, revenue diversification, capital expenditures, AI infrastructure, advertising revenue

news.Title: Can KLA's Greenfield Fab Exposure Spark Multi-Year Revenue Growth?
news.Content: KLA Corporation KLAC appears well-positioned to capitalize on the semiconductor industry’s next wave of greenfield fab investments, driven largely by booming AI infrastructure demand and expanding memory capacity requirements. Its strong exposure to process control intensity at advanced nodes could become a major catalyst for multi-year revenue growth. In the fiscal ...
news.AI_Summary:
• KLA Corporation is well-positioned to benefit from greenfield fab investments driven by AI infrastructure demand and memory capacity requirements.
• The company reported fiscal Q3 2026 revenues of $3.42 billion, up 11% year-over-year, with Semiconductor Process Control revenues up 13%.
• Greenfield opportunities in DRAM and NAND are expected to increase into 2027, supported by AI-driven demand for HBM and advanced logic chips.
• Process control intensity is rising due to complex chip architectures, larger die sizes, and advanced packaging.
• KLA expects its advanced packaging business to generate over $1 billion in revenue this year and continues to generate robust free cash flow, returning capital to shareholders.
news.Keywords: semiconductor equipment, greenfield fabs, process control, AI demand, free cash flow

news.Title: TikTok Pushes Deeper Into Music as Label Relationships Shift
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . TikTok's music strategy is becoming a sharper investor signal for ByteDance's broader platform ambitions, as the company appears to be pulling back from traditional label-facing relationships while moving ...
news.AI_Summary:
• TikTok is deepening its involvement in music, focusing on direct artist services, distribution, and advertising-related licensing, shifting away from traditional label relationships.
• Initiatives like SoundOn (music distribution) and a commercial music library for ads aim to give TikTok more control over its music ecosystem.
• TikTok has launched a partnership with Apple allowing Apple Music subscribers to listen to full tracks within TikTok.
• Despite industry tensions and layoffs in its music division, TikTok remains a crucial platform for the music industry due to its billion-plus monthly users.
• ByteDance, TikTok's parent company, views music more as a cost center but is exploring ways to reshape music economics on its own terms.
news.Keywords: music strategy, direct artist services, advertising licensing, platform ambitions, ecosystem control

news.Title: AMD Takes Quieter China Path
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD , Financials ) is taking a quieter approach in China than ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is pursuing a less public strategy in China compared to Nvidia, but the market remains crucial.
• China accounts for approximately 20% of AMD's revenue across PCs, gaming, and some data center products.
• AMD holds about 4% of China's AI chip market and offers alternatives to Nvidia's CUDA through its ROCm open-source software platform.
• U.S. export controls limit the sale of advanced chips in China, affecting both Nvidia and AMD.
• AMD's software tools are less mature than Nvidia's, and export regulations pose challenges in the Chinese market.
news.Keywords: China market, AI chips, export controls, software platform, market share

news.Title: Tesla Robotaxi Fleet Trails Waymo in Texas
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla Inc. ( TSLA , Financials ) is still in the early innings of ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla's robotaxi fleet in Texas is significantly smaller than Waymo's, with only 42 authorized vehicles compared to Waymo's much larger fleet.
• This data highlights that scaling the robotaxi service remains a gradual process for Tesla, despite years of discussion about self-driving technology.
• Key factors for robotaxi deployment include regulatory clearance, safety performance, operational reliability, and public trust.
• Waymo currently holds a lead in Texas deployment due to its larger operational footprint.
• Tesla's next challenge is to translate its technology roadmap into a commercially viable and larger fleet.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous driving, fleet size, Texas market, commercial scaling

news.Title: Google India Ad Ruling Raises Trademark Risk
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Alphabet ( GOOGL , Financials ) is facing fresh scrutiny in India ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Alphabet (Google) has been ordered by the Delhi High Court to pay $31,600 in damages for trademark infringement in India.
• The court ruled that Google allowed competitors to use a company's brand name as an advertising keyword.
• This ruling could empower Indian businesses to challenge keyword advertising practices, potentially impacting Google's search advertising model.
• Search advertising relies heavily on keyword bidding, making Google vulnerable to increased legal risk in India if more such challenges arise.
• The case highlights potential changes to the economics of online advertising, where brands often pay to protect their names from rivals.
news.Keywords: trademark infringement, keyword advertising, legal risk, India market, search advertising

news.Title: Tesla Stock Fans Just Got Worrying News From Texas
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Tesla ( NASDAQ:TSLA ) has a much smaller robotaxi footprint in Texas ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla has a substantially smaller robotaxi presence in Texas compared to Waymo, with only 42 authorized vehicles versus Waymo's 577.
• Other autonomous vehicle companies like Avride (Nebius), Nuro, and Zoox (Amazon) also have larger authorized fleets in Texas than Tesla.
• New Texas regulations have tightened oversight of commercial self-driving vehicles, with authorization rules becoming enforceable.
• Tesla launched its Texas robotaxi pilot in June 2025, while Waymo launched in March of the same year.
• Tesla's service is currently limited to parts of Austin, Dallas, and Houston, whereas Waymo operates in multiple major cities across Texas.
news.Keywords: robotaxi, autonomous vehicles, Texas regulations, fleet deployment, competitive landscape

news.Title: Can CRUS' Audio Converter Launch Diversify Revenue Streams & Boost Sales?
news.Content: The professional and prosumer audio industry is evolving rapidly. Against this backdrop, Cirrus Logic CRUS has recently introduced a new portfolio of nine audio converters, including analog-to-digital converters (ADCs), digital-to-analog converters (DACs) and CODECs, designed to deliver premium audio quality while maintaining an optimized price-to-performance ratio. The initiative aims to expand CRUS’ audio converter portfolio and reinforces its ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cirrus Logic (CRUS) introduced nine new audio converters (ADCs, DACs, CODECs) aimed at the professional and prosumer audio market, estimated at $9 billion globally.
• The new portfolio includes enhanced analog capabilities and hybrid gain control technology, offering scalability for product development.
• This launch aims to diversify revenue streams beyond smartphones and expand CRUS's presence in professional audio and content creation.
• Competitors Qualcomm and Analog Devices are also active in related technology sectors, with Qualcomm expanding into custom silicon and AI data centers.
• CRUS shares have gained 77.3% in the past year, and the stock appears attractive with a Value Score of A.
news.Keywords: new product portfolio, audio converters, revenue diversification, competitive landscape, professional audio market

news.Title: Hershey Bull Sees World Cup, America 250 Lifting Sales
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Summer events including the FIFA World Cup and America’s 250th anniversary could spur sales of sweet treats, making now a key time to snap up beaten-down shares of Hershey Co., according to the candy and snack maker’s newest Wall Street bull. Most Read from Bloomberg Singapore Hands Byju's Founder His First Ever Jail Term Apple to Overhaul iOS 27 Siri, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Evercore ISI analyst David Palmer initiated coverage on Hershey with an 'outperform' rating and a Street-high price target of $255, implying nearly 30% upside.
• Palmer cited potential sales boosts from summer events like the FIFA World Cup and America's 250th anniversary, alongside a solid Halloween season and an upcoming Hershey movie.
• The analyst believes Hershey shares trade at an attractive valuation, around 19 times 2027 earnings estimates, historically suggesting about 20% upside in the following year.

news.Title: Will Autonomous Agent Growth Accelerate CRWV's Data Center Utilization?
news.Content: The rapid rise of autonomous AI agents is creating favorable demand for cloud infrastructure, and few companies are better positioned to benefit than CoreWeave, Inc. CRWV. As enterprises move beyond traditional AI chatbots toward autonomous systems capable of reasoning, planning and executing tasks independently, the computing requirements behind these applications are expanding dramatically. Recognizing this trend, CRWV has unveiled a unified set of agentic ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The rise of autonomous AI agents is significantly increasing demand for cloud infrastructure, benefiting companies like CoreWeave (CRWV).
• CoreWeave has launched a new platform with agentic AI capabilities focused on real-time learning and continuous improvement, addressing the limitations of traditional AI agent cycles.
• The platform's key pillars include serverless reinforcement learning, production-ready inference, agent observability, and autonomous improvement, aiming to lower costs and improve reliability.
• This trend is expected to drive higher data center utilization, revenue growth, and improved operating leverage for CoreWeave.
• Microsoft (MSFT) is also capitalizing on AI momentum, with Azure cloud infrastructure expansion and strong Copilot adoption contributing to a $37 billion annual revenue run rate for its AI business.
news.Keywords: Cloud Infrastructure, AI Agents, Data Center Utilization, Autonomous Systems, Revenue Growth

news.Title: Why First Solar Stock Is Soaring This Week
news.Content: Before this week began, First Solar (NASDAQ: FSLR) stock had declined about 1.3% since the start of 2026. This week, however, shares of the solar stock are heading sharply ...

news.Title: S&P Futures Gain on Hopes for U.S.-Iran Deal; Dell Pops on Blowout Earnings
news.Content: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are trending up +0.18% this morning as investors became more confident that the U.S. and Iran are nearing a deal. The U.S. and Iran have reportedly reached a tentative deal to extend the ceasefire by 60 days, which would include the reciprocal reopening of the Strait of Hormuz during the first 30 days. It would mark the first phase of a multistage framework, which the U.S. hopes will result in Iran scaling back its nuclear program for decades. “We perhaps have the makings of a deal here,” Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Thursday. ...

• S&P futures gained on hopes of a U.S.-Iran deal, potentially leading to a rise in risk assets and a fall in rates.

• Arm Holdings (ARM) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) experienced notable stock price increases (+10% and +4% respectively).

news.Content: Bill Gates will always be best known for founding Microsoft , the tech conglomerate that created the suite of office tools that essentially power the business world today, along with many other great business lines. Microsoft is one of the largest companies in the world with a market cap of more than $3 trillion. Gates is long removed from running the company's operations, but after stepping down as CEO in 2000, Gates and his ex-wife Melinda formed the Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation, which now goes by the Gates Foundation. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our ...
news.AI_Summary:
